videos.title: Texas Rangers Showing Signs Of Progress As Team Pushes Past .500 | DLLS Rangers Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Texas Rangers Showing Signs Of Progress As Team Pushes Past .500 | DLLS Rangers Podcast Check out Fran Duffy’s 2026 Diehard Draft Guide! https://alldlls.com/draftguide26/

An ALLCITY Network Production

00:00 - INTRO
2:15 - Just The Facts: Rangers Get Win To Open Homestead
7:45 - Just The Facts: Recapping Rangers 5-1 Win
8:00 - Just The Facts: Rangers Start 9-Game Homestead
18:30 - Josh Smith Performance
21:15 - Evan Carter Performance
35:00 - Viewer Questions 
48:00 - Batting Cleanup (On The Farm and Around The League)

The Texas Rangers played only six of their first 22 games of the 2026 MLB season at home, so they were happy to be back at Globe Life Field on Thursday to kick off a nine-game homestand. They did so with a 5-1 victory over the Pirates. But it wasn’t that easy. The Rangers needed a leaping catch by Evan Carter to rob O’Neill Cruz of a three-run homer in the fifth inning. The offense then scored three runs to extend their lead from 2-1. Kumar Rocker was the beneficiary of the Carter catch, but the right-hander also pitched well. He allowed only one run in six innings and walked only one while working efficiently for the first time this season. Josh Smith also had a hand in the win as he tries to shake out of his early-season funk. One issue arose: Wyatt Langford left the game with forearm tightness and will have an MRI exam.

videos.title: Vladar Loses Skate Blade Mid-Play! 😱
videos.summary_source_text:
Vladar Loses Skate Blade Mid-Play! 😱 Dan Vladar makes a strong stop on Yegor Chinakhov, but the shot knocks the blade off his skate mid-play! Realizing it instantly, the Czech goalie dives in an attempt to make another save. A scary moment, but luckily he avoids injury and stays in Game 3 of the first-round playoff series between the Philadelphia Flyers and Pittsburgh Penguins.

videos.title: 22.4: Rantanen Powers Stars to HUGE Game 3 Win in 2OT! 🇫🇮
videos.summary_source_text:
22.4: Rantanen Powers Stars to HUGE Game 3 Win in 2OT! 🇫🇮 Mikko Rantanen helps the Dallas Stars to a big Game 3 win on the road against the Minnesota Wild, opening the scoring on the power play. He later adds an assist on the tying goal, setting up Matt Duchene late in the third period. The Stars go on to win 4-3 in double overtime, taking a 2-1 series lead in a dramatic playoff battle.

videos.title: Is Brandon Williams The Right Backup PG Next To Kyrie Irving & Cooper Flagg? | DLLS Mavs Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Is Brandon Williams The Right Backup PG Next To Kyrie Irving & Cooper Flagg? | DLLS Mavs Podcast Check out Fran Duffy’s 2026 Diehard Draft Guide! https://alldlls.com/draftguide26/

Dallas Mavericks guard Brandon Williams is set to become a free agent this summer. He’s speedy and can finish creatively around the rim, two things that he has in common with superstar teammate Kyrie Irving. But is he the right kind of player alongside Kyrie and rookie Cooper Flagg? The DLLS Mavs crew explores this question. Plus, we’re joined by Tyler Rucker from No Ceilings for some draft talk and of course we top it off with another Tankathon spin, live on YouTube.

#cooperflagg #dallasmavs #nba #pjwashington #danielgafford #klaythompson #najimarshall #jasonkidd #khrismiddleton #kyrieirving #marvinbagley #derecklively

videos.title: NHL Without a Map - Season 14, Jakso 12: Aatu Räty sekä NHLWAM history trivia
videos.summary_source_text:
NHL Without a Map - Season 14, Jakso 12: Aatu Räty sekä NHLWAM history trivia 14. juhlakauden päätösjakso on täällä! Tällä kertaa Anaheimissa kaapataan kyytiin Vancouver Canucksin Aatu Räty, joka on esiintynyt NHLWAMIssa ensimmäistä kertaa jo yli 10 vuotta sitten olleessaan vasta pikkupoika. Aatun kanssa suunnataan legendaariseen P.F. Changiin, muistelemaan matkaa pikkupojasta NHL-pelaajaksi. Puhutaan myös NHL-arjesta, treideistä, pukukoodeista, herätyskelloista ja valkoisen mailan mysteeristä. 

Lisäksi jaksossa luvassa upouusi NHLWAM History Trivia, jossa testataan kuinka hyvin kaudella mukana olleet pelaajat tuntevat sarjan historian... ja vastaukset ovat juuri niin sekavia kuin toivoa voi. Hyppää mukaan kauden viimeiselle reissulle – tätä et halua missata.

Anthropic’s “Mythos” Leak: Discord Group Allegedly Got Access by Guessing the URL

The script discusses a reported leak of Anthropic’s unreleased cybersecurity-focused AI model “Mythos”, described as too powerful for public release and originally shared only with a small set of major companies via Project Glasswing. It claims an unauthorized Discord group gained access after a Merkle breach in April 2026 exposed Anthropic’s internal model-naming rules, enabling the group to guess the hosting URL pattern; access was then obtained using shared contractor accounts and API keys from someone working at an Anthropic-contracted firm. Anthropic issued a statement saying it is investigating unauthorized access via a third-party vendor environment and that core systems were not touched. The script also cites news that Mythos found 271 Firefox vulnerabilities and notes unconfirmed claims the group accessed more of Anthropic’s pipeline.

videos.title: 🇩🇪 GERMAN NIGHT in Edmonton! Draisaitl & Samanski Score in Game 2 🔥
videos.summary_source_text:
🇩🇪 GERMAN NIGHT in Edmonton! Draisaitl & Samanski Score in Game 2 🔥 A night of firsts in Edmonton: Leon Draisaitl opens the scoring with his first goal since returning from injury and his first of the playoffs, later adding an assist on a key play that helps bring Edmonton back into the game in the second period. Josh Samanski follows with a big moment of his own, scoring his first NHL playoff goal on his first shot to tie the game in his postseason debut. With that, the Oilers become the first team in Stanley Cup Playoffs history with multiple German-born players scoring a goal in the same game. Despite the historic night, Edmonton falls 6-4 to the Anaheim Ducks in a hard-fought battle.

#nhl #hockey #nationalhockeyleague #explore #fyp #viral #sports #nhleurope #hockeyeurope #europe #european #highlight #highlights #nhlhighlight #nhlhighlights #hockeyhighlight #hockeyhighlights #sportshighlight #sportshighlights #icehockey #mustwatch #mustwatchhockey #mustwatchsports #euro #playoffs #stanleycupplayoffs #oilers #edmontonoilers #draisaitl #leondraisaitl #samanski #joshsamanski A night of firsts in Edmonton: Leon Draisaitl opens the scoring with his first goal since returning from injury and his first of the playoffs, later adding an assist on a key play that helps bring Edmonton back into the game in the second period. Josh Samanski follows with a big moment of his own, scoring his first NHL playoff goal on his first shot to tie the game in his postseason debut. With that, the Oilers become the first team in Stanley Cup Playoffs history with multiple German-born players scoring a goal in the same game. Despite the historic night, Edmonton falls 6-4 to the Anaheim Ducks in a hard-fought battle.

videos.title: Hindi | 22nd April, Wednesday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi | 22nd April, Wednesday - RIFT Presentation 22/04/26
3FO – The Next-Generation Financial Ecosystem Powered by AI and DeFi

3FO is an innovative digital platform designed to redefine how individuals interact with modern finance. Built at the intersection of artificial intelligence, decentralized finance (DeFi), and blockchain transparency, 3FO provides users with powerful tools to participate in the evolving digital economy and explore new opportunities for wealth creation.

At the core of the 3FO ecosystem is its vision of financial empowerment through accessible technology. The platform combines advanced AI-driven strategies with decentralized infrastructure, enabling users to participate in automated yield systems without needing deep technical knowledge of trading or DeFi protocols.

One of the standout elements of 3FO is the Alpha AI Yield engine, an intelligent system designed to optimize digital asset strategies and manage yield generation across multiple decentralized protocols. By leveraging adaptive algorithms and diversified deployment strategies, Alpha AI continuously analyzes market conditions and allocates capital in ways intended to maximize efficiency and performance.

3FO also introduces an integrated financial framework that brings together several powerful components within one ecosystem. These include LQUIDPAY, a self-custodial DeFi banking environment that enables global transactions, crypto spending, and on-chain yield opportunities, and Protocol Yield, a performance-focused platform designed to provide transparent, traceable returns powered by decentralized financial strategies.

Another key feature of the platform is its emphasis on transparency and user control. Because the system operates on blockchain infrastructure, users can view earnings and transactions in real time, providing visibility into how digital assets move and generate yield across the network.

3FO is also built with scalability and collaboration in mind. Through its network-driven model, participants can expand their engagement within the ecosystem while benefiting from a structure designed to encourage shared growth and collective success.

With a focus on AI automation, decentralized finance innovation, and user-controlled digital banking, 3FO aims to create a comprehensive financial environment where technology works continuously to support smarter asset management and new economic opportunities.

As the global financial landscape evolves toward blockchain-based systems, 3FO positions itself as a forward-thinking platform that merges cutting-edge technology with accessible financial tools—empowering individuals to participate in the future of programmable money and decentralized wealth creation. 22/04/26

videos.title: 2026 NFL Mock Draft: Final First Round Predictions & Broncos Pick 62 Targets
videos.summary_source_text:
2026 NFL Mock Draft: Final First Round Predictions & Broncos Pick 62 Targets The 2026 NFL Draft is finally here. With the Denver Broncos officially out of the first round following the Jaylen Waddle trade, the focus shifts to how Sean Payton and George Paton will navigate the board starting at Pick 62.
In today’s episode, the DNVR Draft crew delivers their final first-round predictions, identifies the "dream droppers" who could fall into Denver's lap, and highlights a group of premium-position prospects we haven’t talked about for Denver. We also dive into the "Terrible Bs"—a loaded class of wide receivers including Zachariah Branch and Germie Bernard—and discuss which big-bodied EDGE rushers and offensive tackles fit the Broncos' mold.
On today’s show:
• 1st Round Mock Draft: Final predictions for the top 32 and what the 2-pick teams (Giants, Browns, Chiefs, Cowboys, Dolphins) will do.
• Draft Surprises: Which picks are going to shock the league?
• Betting the Draft: A look at the latest draft odds for the First Round.
• Broncos Dream Scenarios: Could McCoy, Banks, or Mesidor actually slide to the late second?
• The "Terrible Bs" WRs: Breaking down Chris Bell, Chris Brazzell II, Zachariah Branch, Denzel Boston, and Germie Bernard.
• Premium Positions: Why the Broncos could surprise us again by drafting someone at a non-position of need.
• The Final Word: What is the most likely outcome for the Broncos at No. 62?

videos.title: THURSDAY GAMEDAY! 3 Storylines Heading into Game 3 for the Carolina Hurricanes
videos.summary_source_text:
THURSDAY GAMEDAY! 3 Storylines Heading into Game 3 for the Carolina Hurricanes The Carolina Hurricanes are up 2-0 in the series, and are looking to take a 3-0 stranglehold on the series. That said, what are the three storylines heading into Game 3 against the Ottawa Senators? On the Thursday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the story by giving his first storyline heading into Game 3, which features Frederik Andersen. After giving up two goals through the first two games, can Andersen keep his current run of form going? His 0.78 GAA and .967 SV% have been huge for the Hurricanes, and they will be looking for him to stay red hot in the crease. Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on how the Hurricanes will need to stick to their structure and fend off the Senators' push at home in Game 3. With them being down 2-0 already and not wanting to go down 3-0, the Senators will be aggressive. The Hurricanes will need to fend that off and counter them with their system. Lastly, Zach concludes the show by looking at the big players stepping up in Game 3. While the second line has been producing, along with Sebastian Aho and Jordan Martinook getting on the xcoresheet, the Hurricanes will need the top guys to get rolling and really put pressure on the Senators. All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Nicolas Roy Rescues Avalanche in OT to Give Colorado a 2-0 Series Lead Over the LA Kings
videos.summary_source_text:
Nicolas Roy Rescues Avalanche in OT to Give Colorado a 2-0 Series Lead Over the LA Kings Colorado Avalanche gut out thrilling OT win to edge Los Angeles Kings and take a 2-0 series lead. Can Scott Wedgwood’s heroics fuel a commanding playoff run?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down the Avalanche’s 2-1 victory, spotlighting Nick Roy’ clutch overtime goal and dominant goaltending from Scott Wedgewood. The episode covers the physical intensity between the Avalanche and Kings, Anton Forsberg’s standout saves, and the controversy over a glass-shattering delay that stretched a late-night finish. Key topics include Artemi Panarin’s power play prowess, Colorado’s need to improve on the man advantage, and crucial lineup decisions as the series shifts to Los Angeles.

Will the Kings’ aggressive, disruptive style finally pay off, or does Colorado have another gear? Don’t miss this essential analysis of the Avalanche’s playoff grit and the pivotal moments shaping their Stanley Cup quest.

videos.title: Google’s New SIMULA Builds AI Without Limits
videos.summary_source_text:
Google’s New SIMULA Builds AI Without Limits Google just introduced Simula, a new system for generating synthetic datasets by designing the dataset structure first instead of randomly prompting models and hoping for useful outputs. It maps entire domains, creates varied meta prompts, controls difficulty, and uses a dual-critic setup to check quality before the data is used for training. At the same time, OpenAI released Euphony to turn messy agent logs into readable timelines, while signs of a new system codenamed Hermes point to ChatGPT moving toward persistent background agents. Across training data, debugging, and agent workflows, AI is starting to shift in a very different direction.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com
🚀 New Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@science.revolution

🧠 What You’ll See
Google Simula
SOURCE: https://research.google/blog/designing-synthetic-datasets-for-the-real-world-mechanism-design-and-reasoning-from-first-principles/
Why synthetic data can outperform traditional datasetsSOURCE: https://www.techpolicy.press/the-urgency-of-standards-for-synthetic-data-in-the-era-of-agentic-ai/
OpenAI Euphony
SOURCE: https://sequoiacap.com/podcast/training-data-chatgpt-agent/
OpenAI Hermes
SOURCE: https://www.testingcatalog.com/openai-develops-platform-for-always-on-agents-on-chatgpt/

🚨 Why It Matters
This is bigger than one more model or product update. Simula points to a future where the AI advantage comes from designing better data instead of collecting more of it, while Euphony and Hermes show the same broader shift toward agents that are easier to inspect, control, and keep running over time.

videos.title: What to expect at The Zurich Classic & Texas' Christiaan Maas joins | The Drop
videos.summary_source_text:
What to expect at The Zurich Classic & Texas' Christiaan Maas joins | The Drop The Drop gets you ready for the Zurich Classic of New Orleans, as former PGA TOUR player Matt Every breaks down how the teams are formed, how the players strategize on the course and what the social scene is like while the TOUR is in the Big Easy. Next, we pull back the curtain for what life inside the ropes is like with select scenes from the PGA TOUR and NFL Films collaboration “Chasing Sunday: Si Woo Kim Unheard.” Later, we updated the PGA TOUR University standings as college teams head toward the postseason and welcomed Texas senior Christiaan Maas to the show. Ranked second in the standings, the South African joined us to talk about the dynamics of balancing team and individual goals while playing for legendary coach John Fields. He also talks about managing a busy schedule with his golf career, classes and balancing his free time to communicate with a fiancée who hasn’t yet moved to the U.S. from South Africa. Finally, Min Woo Lee allowed our cameras to follow him at his practice round prior to the RBC Heritage and then watched it back while providing his own commentary on how he performed.

00:00 Introduction
00:33 Zurich Classic preview 
03:21 Chasing Sunday: Unheard with Si Woo Kim
8:33 Recap of the 2026 RBC Heritage
9:15 University of Texas’ Christiaan Mass joins
14:51 Scottie Scheffler’s surges
15:30 Min Woo Lee breaks down his practice round
19:33 FedExCup Standings Update 
19:48 Outro

videos.title: Nuggets! More Nuggets! A Serbian perspective on Nuggets-Timberwolves | Serbian Corner IN STUDIO
videos.summary_source_text:
Nuggets! More Nuggets! A Serbian perspective on Nuggets-Timberwolves | Serbian Corner IN STUDIO The Homie Miroslav has once again made the trip across the Atlantic and into the Rocky Mountains. After being at games 1 and 2, what does Miroslav make of the Timberwolves series so far? What does Miro make of Jokic's first two games? It's a special IN STUDIO edition of the Serbian Corner. The Homie Miroslav Cuk is joined by Adam Mares, Brendan Vogt, and Eric Wedum (D-Line Co.) come to you LIVE from DNVR HQ to break down everything you need to know in Nuggets Nation!

0:00 - Intro
3:40 - DefCon stonk reports

videos.title: Most Players Don’t Learn This About Backwards Skating
videos.summary_source_text:
Most Players Don’t Learn This About Backwards Skating The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: Jokic vs Gobert and the Key Battlegrounds for the Nuggets & Wolves | DNVR Nuggets Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Jokic vs Gobert and the Key Battlegrounds for the Nuggets & Wolves | DNVR Nuggets Podcast Nikola Jokic and Rudy Gobert have gotten the headlines for the Nuggets vs Timberwolves series through two games but there are other key battlegrounds in this series. Jamal Murray has been inefficient and aggressive. David Adelman has to find a way to play his bench longer. And Aaron Gordon has to be able to put pressure on the paint. Anthony Edwards hasn’t hit his outside shot yet. Will he? And what were the notes from Denver Nuggets practice? The DNVR Nuggets crew beaks it all down.

0:00 - Intro
3:50 - Around the Association
18:28 - Adelman on the McDaniels quote & other practice notes

videos.summary_source_text:
Marco D’Amico on Slafkovsky, Anderson Impact & Game 3 Atmosphere | The Sheet Jeff Marek is joined by Marco D’Amico to break down a pivotal Game 2 between the Montreal Canadiens and Tampa Bay Lightning as the series evens at 1-1. They dive into the Canadiens’ strong start before Tampa’s experience took over, the struggles of the Nick Suzuki line at five-on-five, and the continued emergence of Lane Hutson as a legitimate offensive threat. The guys also discuss Juraj Slafkovský’s physical play, Josh Anderson’s playoff impact, and whether Montreal got pulled into Tampa’s style of game. Plus, a full Game 3 preview with the Bell Centre atmosphere set to hit another level as the series shifts back to Montreal.

Subscribe for more NHL playoff breakdowns, analysis, and daily coverage right here on The Sheet.

videos.title: It’s Time to Improve Your Forward Stride
videos.summary_source_text:
It’s Time to Improve Your Forward Stride The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body’s own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness.
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

The Dallas Cowboys have made their plan clear with George Pickens, and it does not include a long-term extension right now. Dallas is preparing for Pickens to play under the franchise tag, so what does that mean for his future with the Cowboys, the salary cap, and how it could impact their strategy in the 2026 NFL Draft?

We’re breaking down what the Pickens decision tells us about the front office, whether it changes the urgency at wide receiver, and if this is a one-year gamble or the start of something bigger.

Plus, with the Cowboys holding picks 12 and 20 in the first round, what’s most likely to happen? Stay put and make the picks? Trade up for a star? Move back and stack assets? We give our predictions on what Dallas will do and the names that make the most sense.

videos.title: Nuggets RESPOND to Jaden McDaniels' Comments, Peyton Watson Injury News & More Before Game 3 vs MIN
videos.summary_source_text:
Nuggets RESPOND to Jaden McDaniels' Comments, Peyton Watson Injury News & More Before Game 3 vs MIN The Denver Nuggets are heading to Minneapolis for a massive Game 3 vs. the Minnesota Timberwolves, and DNVR has the latest on Denver’s response to Jaden McDaniels’ comments, Peyton Watson’s injury status, and the biggest practice takeaways before the series shifts to Minnesota. Hear what David Adelman, Christian Braun, and the Nuggets had to say about Denver’s defense, rebounding issues, and the heated tone of this Nuggets vs. Timberwolves NBA Playoffs matchup. This Denver Nuggets update breaks down what went wrong in Game 2, what must improve in Game 3, and how Peyton Watson’s injury could impact the series moving forward. Stay locked in with DNVR for more Denver Nuggets news, playoff coverage, practice notes, and Game 3 analysis. Go inside Denver Nuggets practice with Brendan Vogt for the latest Denver Nuggets news.

videos.title: Wyatt Johnston Is The Game 3 Hero! Stars Beat Wild 4-3 In Double Overtime | DLLS STARS POSTGAME
videos.summary_source_text:
Wyatt Johnston Is The Game 3 Hero! Stars Beat Wild 4-3 In Double Overtime | DLLS STARS POSTGAME Check out Fran Duffy’s 2026 Diehard Draft Guide! https://alldlls.com/draftguide26/

Wyatt Johnston was the hero of Game 3, as he scored the game-winning goal at 12:10 of double overtime, giving the Dallas Stars a 4-3 win over the Minnesota Wild. Dallas now has a 2-1 lead in the best-of-seven first round series, with Game 4 scheduled for Saturday, April 25th at Grand Casino Arena. The Stars went 3-for-8 on the power play in the game, including goals from Mikko Rantanen and Matt Duchene. Jason Robertson scored at even strength, as both he and Duchene finished with game-high three point games (1-2-3). For the Wild, Marcus Johansson scored a power play goal, while Joel Eriksson Ek and Michael McCarron each found the net at five-on-five. videos.title: Put Salt in Your Socks Before Bed — Feel What Happens to Your Body
videos.summary_source_text:
Put Salt in Your Socks Before Bed — Feel What Happens to Your Body What happens when you stimulate the bottom of your feet before bed might surprise you. The soles of your feet are packed with mechanoreceptors and thermoreceptors that send powerful signals directly to your brain and nervous system. When you apply a simple textured stimulus like salt inside your socks, combined with warmth and gentle pressure, you can increase sensory input, support circulation, and help shift your body from a stressed sympathetic state into a more relaxed parasympathetic state. This is not about curing illness or boosting immunity, but about giving your nervous system the right input at the right time to promote relaxation, recovery, and better sleep. Try this simple 60-second technique tonight and notice how your body responds.

This is a simple neurosensory trick, not a cure or medical treatment. Results will vary, but it’s safe to try and very interesting to feel. 
You don’t need much at all.
Just a small handful or a light layer under the ball of the foot or heel is enough. The goal is gentle pressure on the nerve endings, not packing the sock full.

If it feels uncomfortable or too intense, you’re using too much. Keep it subtle.

👉 Remember, it’s the pressure and stimulation, not the salt itself.


*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

videos.summary_source_text:
🔥 You won't believe it! Sugar-free! In 5 minutes! Protein-rich, healthy candies! 🔥 You won't believe it! Sugar-free! In 5 minutes! Protein-rich, healthy candies! An easy, quick, and delicious recipe! Enjoy making them!

1/4 cup (40 g) pumpkin seeds. 1/2 cup (80 g) dates.
1/4 cup (30 g) walnuts. 1/2 cup (70 g) cranberries.
1/3 cup (40 g) hazelnuts. 1/4 cup (60 g) prunes.
3.5 oz (100 g) melted sugar‑free dark chocolate.
1 tbsp pumpkin seeds.
Refrigerate the candies until fully set for 2 hours.

videos.title: Playoff Takeaways, Trevor Lewis Retires, and Bolts Draw Even ft. Brian Burke & Marco D'Amico
videos.summary_source_text:
Playoff Takeaways, Trevor Lewis Retires, and Bolts Draw Even ft. Brian Burke & Marco D'Amico Today on The Sheet, Jeff Marek is joined by Brian Burke to break down the opening days of the Stanley Cup Playoffs. They dive into the biggest surprises from the first games of the postseason, the early concerns for contenders, and what has stood out around the league as the chase for the Cup begins. Burke also shares his thoughts on the playoff atmosphere in Buffalo and what it means for the market as hockey energy returns to the city. Plus, a look back at the career of Trevor Lewis as the longtime NHL veteran announces his retirement.

Later, Marco D’Amico joins the show to break down the Montreal Canadiens vs Tampa Bay Lightning series after it evened up at 1-1. They discuss the slow start for Montreal’s top line, Juraj Slafkovsky’s emergence in the playoffs, what adjustments the Canadiens may need to make, and how the Lightning are responding as the series heats up.

Don’t forget to like, subscribe, and turn on notifications so you never miss an episode of The Sheet.

#NHL #StanleyCupPlayoffs #TheSheet #JeffMarek #BrianBurke #MontrealCanadiens #GoHabsGo #TampaBayLightning #JurajSlafkovsky #Hockey

videos.title: GPT-Image-2 Breakdown: The First AI That Can Actually Write Text in Images
videos.summary_source_text:
GPT-Image-2 Breakdown: The First AI That Can Actually Write Text in Images Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
ChatGPT Images 2.0 is here — and it’s not just an upgrade… it’s a complete shift in how AI generates images.

Powered by GPT-Image-2, this new model goes beyond traditional diffusion models like DALL·E and introduces a reasoning-based approach to image creation. The result? Near-perfect text rendering, multilingual support, faster generation, and consistent multi-image outputs.

In this video, I break down everything you need to know:

What ChatGPT Images 2.0 actually is
How it works differently from older AI image models
Real benchmarks and performance comparisons
New features like Thinking Mode, multi-image consistency, and 4K output
Real-world use cases for creators, designers, and developers
Limitations, safety concerns, and what still doesn’t work

⏱ Timestamps
00:00 Introduction – Why AI Image Generators Fail
01:16 What Is ChatGPT Images 2.0? (GPT-Image-2 Explained)
02:30 Key Features & Improvements (Text, Multilingual, Speed)
04:18 How ChatGPT Images 2.0 Works (Thinking Mode + Architecture)
05:42 Benchmarks & Performance (LM Arena Results Explained)
07:11 Real Examples & Use Cases (Infographics, UI, Manga, Text)
09:09 API, Pricing & Integrations (Canva, Figma, Adobe)
10:55 Limitations & Safety (What It Still Gets Wrong)
12:45 Who Should Use ChatGPT Images 2.0?
13:42 Future Roadmap (What’s Coming Next)


Whether you're a content creator, marketer, or AI enthusiast, this is one of the biggest upgrades in AI image generation you need to understand.

videos.title: Lightning, Bruins & Mammoth All Even Up First Round Series | Daily Faceoff Live
videos.summary_source_text:
Lightning, Bruins & Mammoth All Even Up First Round Series | Daily Faceoff Live Three first-round series are all square after a chaotic night in the NHL. The Tampa Bay Lightning finally snap their overtime skid thanks to a winner from JJ Moser, but not before tensions boil over in a penalty-filled clash with the Montreal Canadiens. Was Scott Sabourin’s hit intentional, and did the Bolts lose focus in the chaos?

Out West, Logan Cooley showcases his speed as he lifts the Mammoth past the Vegas Golden Knights, while Boston Bruins winger Viktor Arvidsson pots a pair to even their series heading back to Boston. Meanwhile, questions surround the Buffalo Sabres shot selection against Jeremy Swayman—is perimeter play holding them back?

We break down the keys to victory for the Anaheim Ducks and Edmonton Oilers ahead of tonight’s action.

In “The Film Room,” Steve Peters dives into Dallas vs. Minnesota and Pittsburgh vs. Philadelphia, plus we revisit the debate: was Charlie McAvoy’s hip check a trip?

All that, plus betting angles, fan chaos, and more in Garbage Time.

videos.title: UK | 22nd April, Wednesday - RIFT Presentation with Shavez
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 22nd April, Wednesday - RIFT Presentation with Shavez 22/04/26
3FO – The Next-Generation Financial Ecosystem Powered by AI and DeFi

3FO is an innovative digital platform designed to redefine how individuals interact with modern finance. Built at the intersection of artificial intelligence, decentralized finance (DeFi), and blockchain transparency, 3FO provides users with powerful tools to participate in the evolving digital economy and explore new opportunities for wealth creation.

At the core of the 3FO ecosystem is its vision of financial empowerment through accessible technology. The platform combines advanced AI-driven strategies with decentralized infrastructure, enabling users to participate in automated yield systems without needing deep technical knowledge of trading or DeFi protocols.

One of the standout elements of 3FO is the Alpha AI Yield engine, an intelligent system designed to optimize digital asset strategies and manage yield generation across multiple decentralized protocols. By leveraging adaptive algorithms and diversified deployment strategies, Alpha AI continuously analyzes market conditions and allocates capital in ways intended to maximize efficiency and performance.

3FO also introduces an integrated financial framework that brings together several powerful components within one ecosystem. These include LQUIDPAY, a self-custodial DeFi banking environment that enables global transactions, crypto spending, and on-chain yield opportunities, and Protocol Yield, a performance-focused platform designed to provide transparent, traceable returns powered by decentralized financial strategies.

Another key feature of the platform is its emphasis on transparency and user control. Because the system operates on blockchain infrastructure, users can view earnings and transactions in real time, providing visibility into how digital assets move and generate yield across the network.

3FO is also built with scalability and collaboration in mind. Through its network-driven model, participants can expand their engagement within the ecosystem while benefiting from a structure designed to encourage shared growth and collective success.

With a focus on AI automation, decentralized finance innovation, and user-controlled digital banking, 3FO aims to create a comprehensive financial environment where technology works continuously to support smarter asset management and new economic opportunities.

As the global financial landscape evolves toward blockchain-based systems, 3FO positions itself as a forward-thinking platform that merges cutting-edge technology with accessible financial tools—empowering individuals to participate in the future of programmable money and decentralized wealth creation. 22/04/26

By leveraging adaptive algorithms and diversified deployment strategies, Alpha AI continuously analyzes market conditions and allocates capital in ways intended to maximize efficiency and performance.

3FO also introduces an integrated financial framework that brings together several powerful components within one ecosystem. These include LQUIDPAY, a self-custodial DeFi banking environment that enables global transactions, crypto spending, and on-chain yield opportunities, and Protocol Yield, a performance-focused platform designed to provide transparent, traceable returns powered by decentralized financial strategies.

Another key feature of the platform is its emphasis on transparency and user control. Because the system operates on blockchain infrastructure, users can view earnings and transactions in real time, providing visibility into how digital assets move and generate yield across the network.

3FO is also built with scalability and collaboration in mind. Through its network-driven model, participants can expand their engagement within the ecosystem while benefiting from a structure designed to encourage shared growth and collective success.

With a focus on AI automation, decentralized finance innovation, and user-controlled digital banking, 3FO aims to create a comprehensive financial environment where technology works continuously to support smarter asset management and new economic opportunities.

As the global financial landscape evolves toward blockchain-based systems, 3FO positions itself as a forward-thinking platform that merges cutting-edge technology with accessible financial tools—empowering individuals to participate in the future of programmable money and decentralized wealth creation.

What's Next For The Vancouver Canucks? 2026 Off-Season Plan What's Next For The Vancouver Canucks? 2026 Off-Season Plan 
How will The Vancouver Canucks attempt at moving forward and making their team more competitive in 2026-27? How can they bounce back and move back into a playoffs spot after not making the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Playoffs. I examine the past season, team roster and determine their best plan to improve the team.  We address NHL Trade Rumours regarding Vancouver Canucks trade rumours and how they should proceed on that.  We analyze their 2026 NHL Prospects and deals they may try to make at the draft.  They are in good shape with draft picks in the 2026 NHL Draft.  We discuss the 2026 NHL Draft prospects they could select as well. There have been plenty of NHL Trade rumours 2026 regarding this team Vancouver Canucks rumours and whether they stand a good chance at making some off-season moves.  We discuss other NHL free agents 2026 that they could explore signing as well.  We will see if any of the Vancouver Canucks trade talk will come to be or what direction this team will head in. videos.title: Could This Golf Club Replace Vokey Wedges
videos.summary_source_text:
Could This Golf Club Replace Vokey Wedges Guy puts Takomo wedges through their pace,  but can a budget option really challenge the most trusted wedges in the game?

Vokey wedges have been the go-to for amateurs and tour pros alike for years. But Takomo has been quietly building a reputation for premium performance at a fraction of the price. Guy finds out whether the spin, feel, and versatility are genuinely comparable, or whether there are corners being cut you'd only notice on the course.

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.summary_source_text:
The Makeup Of The Montreal Canadiens | JD Bunkis Podcast JD Bunkis is joined in studio by co-host of The Fan Morning Show, Ben Ennis, to discuss the Blue Jays’ early-season ups and downs, including Jeff Hoffman’s role as closer. Later, two-time Stanley Cup champion Kris Versteeg joins the show to break down the early stages of the Stanley Cup Playoffs and how the Canadiens have emerged as a contender.
--------------------------------------------- 

0:00 - Blue Jays Optimism and Pessimism w/ Ben Ennis
49:00 - "Sports Bar Rescue" w/ Ben Ennis
1:02:10 - Stanley Cup Playoffs w/ Kris Versteeg

videos.title: Hur ska jag tänka med lån till vänner och bekanta?
videos.summary_source_text:
Hur ska jag tänka med lån till vänner och bekanta? Hur ska jag tänka med lån till vänner och bekanta? Detta en fråga som vi har diskuterat mycket i communityn och jag skulle säga att samsynen är så här don't.

Låna inte ut pengar till anhöriga utan vill du då hjälpa anhöriga eller vänner är det bättre att se pengarna som en gåva för att undvika problem som kommer med att låna ut till närstående.

Kommentera gärna vad du tänker 💬 Hur ska jag tänka med lån till vänner och bekanta? Detta en fråga som vi har diskuterat mycket i communityn och jag skulle säga att samsynen är så här don't.

Låna inte ut pengar till anhöriga utan vill du då hjälpa anhöriga eller vänner är det bättre att se pengarna som en gåva för att undvika problem som kommer med att låna ut till närstående.

Kommentera gärna vad du tänker 💬

videos.title: Bolts & Bruins Even The Series ft. Pierre McGuire & Mike Johnson | Morning Cuppa Hockey
videos.summary_source_text:
Bolts & Bruins Even The Series ft. Pierre McGuire & Mike Johnson | Morning Cuppa Hockey Start your day with the messiest, loudest NHL conversations on Morning Cuppa Hockey! Jonny Lazarus and Colby Cohen are back to break down a massive night of playoff action and check in with one of the league's brightest young stars.

The guys start by welcoming Pierre McGuire to break down the Montreal Canadiens through the first 2 games of their first round series against the Tampa Bay Lightning.

Next, Mike Johnson drops by to discuss the Ottawa Senators, and if they have any hopes of getting back into the series with the Hurricanes.

To wrap things up, the guys will take a deeper look at Game 2 between the Sabres and Bruins, recap the Mammoth and Golden Knights, and discuss whether the Kings have any chance at all at pulling off the upset over Colorado.

Don’t miss a second of the daily hockey talk!

videos.summary_source_text:
Why Movement Starts to Feel Unsafe If movement has started to feel unsafe, you are not weak — and you are not failing.
In this video, I explore how fear of movement often develops after injury or painful experiences, and how the body can learn patterns of protection that show up as hesitation, bracing, or avoidance.
I also guide a short somatic exploration to help you sense these patterns in a gentle and safe way.
If you’d like to go deeper, here’s the free guided somatic session:
⭐ Free Somatic Masterclass — Move More Freely in Your Body
Watch here: https://taro-iwamoto.thinkific.com/courses/masterclass

https://taroiwamoto.com/thecourse

Taro is a nervous system movement coach helping self-aware adults who have lost trust in their bodies due to past traumas and limiting beliefs go from feeling disconnected and fearful in their restricted lives to experiencing profound reconnection with their bodies, enabling them to move freely and joyfully through nervous system learning and guided somatic movement practices.

videos.title: BMW’s new S-Class KILLER!
videos.summary_source_text:
BMW’s new S-Class KILLER! Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-22-04

The BMW 7 Series has undergone a facelift! 

But this is no ordinary facelift with a couple of minor tweaks and changes - it’s one of the most extreme facelifts that BMW has ever done! So what exactly has changed? 

When it comes to the exterior design, it may look similar to the previous car, but there are, in fact, a whole host of changes. Up front, the light design has been changed, with the main beam and normal beam combined into one, allowing the introduction of a bigger front bumper. The grille has been reshaped, and the bonnet's design has also been updated. The two-tone paint scheme has been retained, but more colours are now available. There are new alloy options, and around the back, there’s a new boot lid, tail lights and rear bumper. It’s a huge overhaul! 

Step inside, and several elements have been borrowed from the iX3. There’s a new infotainment screen, Panoramic iVision, and the same steering wheel. There are soft-touch, high-quality materials throughout the entire cabin, and for the first time, a BMW has a third screen for the front passenger. The huge widescreen display in the back has also been updated, and it now has an 8K display, coupled with Dolby Atmos! 

Under the bonnet, there will be a choice of 3-litre straight six diesel and petrol engines, while there’ll also be a 3-litre PHEV with over 600hp! An all-electric i7 is also due with 680hp, and there are even rumours of a V8 edition on the horizon! 

So what do you think - is the new 7 Series the ultimate luxury limo? Let us know in the comments! Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-22-04

videos.title: The #1 Healthiest Bread in the World
videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Healthiest Bread in the World The healthiest bread in the world is not at the grocery store. While many low-carb bread recipes fall short, this healthy bread recipe has a delicious taste and perfect texture. This is the absolute best bread for your health, and you won’t even guess it’s keto-friendly. 

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

0:00 Introduction: The best bread for health
0:33 Wheat bread vs. white bread 
3:10 Good bread vs. bad bread
3:45 How to make healthy bread

Download Dr. Berg's Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/4e30WAs

Healthy Bread Version 1: https://youtu.be/lzsl5ENgZnr0 

Videos on Glyphosate:
https://youtu.be/lFlHdFd91JI
https://youtu.be/TYTsQbahME0 

Keep watching to learn more about the harmful ingredients hidden in most breads:
https://youtu.be/tn6c7drTfLY
https://youtu.be/XiMxWUF6k04
https://youtu.be/O6ftQwEeMHY

It’s often thought that whole wheat bread is the best bread for health, but this isn’t true. The average glycemic index for whole wheat bread is identical to that of white bread. Both spike blood sugar more than table sugar!

Whole wheat bread contains phytic acid, an anti-nutrient that binds with important minerals, blocking their absorption. Whole wheat bread contains inflammatory compounds and may also contain glyphosate.

This 5-ingredient healthy bread is low on the glycemic index, so it will not spike your blood sugar. It doesn’t contain anti-nutrients, inflammatory compounds, or glyphosate. 

Here’s how to make healthy bread that’s simple and delicious:
• Preheat your oven to 350 degrees.

• Combine the following ingredients:
1½ cups blanched almond flour
¼ cup psyllium husk powder 
2 tsp baking powder
¼ tsp sea salt
4 organic eggs, separated 

• Combine dry ingredients.
• Beat egg whites with a mixer until stiff peaks form.
• In a separate bowl, mix egg yolks with a tablespoon of melted butter.
• Combine egg yolk mixture with dry ingredients.
• Gently fold in whipped egg whites.
• Line a loaf pan with parchment paper.
• Put the dough in a loaf pan and put it in the oven to bake. 
• Bake for 30-35 minutes.
• Allow bread to cool completely before slicing.

videos.title: Why Do Most Indian Men Have a Protruding Potbelly?
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Do Most Indian Men Have a Protruding Potbelly? Watch this video to learn about the potential reasons why many Indian men tend to have a protruding potbelly and how it can be linked to their diet and gut health.

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

0:00 Intro: Why do many Indian men develop a potbelly, and how can it be addressed?
0:33 Potential factors contributing to abdominal fat
0:54 Differences between omnivorous and herbivorous diets
2:56 History of the Indian diet
4:54 Strategies for minimizing belly fat

Download the FREE Dr. Berg Junk Food Meter app here: https://drbrg.co/42iOhCd
Apple Download: https://drbrg.co/4tXDBVm
Android Download: https://drbrg.co/4tYLytl

Download My Free Beginner’s Guide to Healthy Keto and Fasting 👉 https://drbrg.co/4mHEwae 

The protruding potbelly is a common sight among many Indian men, and it can be attributed to a combination of factors such as genetics, lifestyle habits, and diet. While the tendency to store abdominal fat may have some genetic component, the high prevalence of this condition among Indian men suggests that there may be other contributing factors at play.

One potential factor is the traditional Indian diet, which has evolved over time. Historically, Indians consumed a predominantly plant-based diet with small amounts of meat, mostly goat or sheep. However, as modern diets have become more Westernized, there has been a significant increase in the consumption of ultra-processed foods high in sugar, seed oils, and refined starches.

These highly processed foods can cause inflammation in the gut and weaken the stomach lining, making it easier for harmful bacteria such as H. pylori to thrive. H. pylori is a type of bacteria that can cause gastritis and ulcers by weakening the stomach's protective mucus lining. To survive in the stomach's acidic environment, it produces ammonia that neutralizes stomach acid. This can lead to further digestive issues and an increased risk of developing diseases.

To address these problems, refined carbs should be eliminated from the diet, and protein intake should be increased, particularly from animal sources. Doing intermittent fasting and avoiding foods that cause bloating may be beneficial. Introducing betaine hydrochloride as a supplement can also help improve stomach acid levels and kill off pathogens in the gut.

In addition, understanding the digestive system and its functions can provide valuable insights on how to take care of it and address specific issues. Ultimately, by making mindful food choices and adopting nutritious eating habits, Indian men can work towards minimizing belly fat and improving their overall gut health.

videos.title: Colton Herta: Doing The Work | F1 Beyond The Grid Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Colton Herta: Doing The Work | F1 Beyond The Grid Podcast Formula 1 has always been a dream for Colton Herta. Walking away from IndyCar to race in Formula 2 is a gamble. His reward, should he prove himself, could be an F1 drive with Cadillac. Colton has come close to F1 before. This time he’s determined to make it.

Speaking on the day he had a seat-fit for Cadillac’s F1 car, Colton Herta tells Tom Clarkson about growing up at racetracks with his father, IndyCar legend Bryan Herta, his love of motorsport and F1 deals that never happened with Sauber and Red Bull’s junior team.

Colton also remembers leaving the US as a teenager to race in Europe, where he was teammates with a young Lando Norris in junior categories, and he looks forward to making his F1 practice session debut for Cadillac later this season.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

videos.title: What Should Carolina Hurricanes Fans Be Concerned or Not Concerned About After 2 Games?
videos.summary_source_text:
What Should Carolina Hurricanes Fans Be Concerned or Not Concerned About After 2 Games? The Carolina Hurricanes are up 2-0 in the series after winning Games 1 (2-0) and Game 2 (3-2) as the series shifts to Ottawa. However, before we focus on Game 3, what should Hurricanes fans be concerned about or not concerned about? On the Wednesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach shares his thoughts on what fans should not be concerned about. One of them is Frederik Andersen, who has a sub-1.00 goals against average and a .967 save percentage. Despite the one soft goal he gave up in Game 2, Andersen has been lights out for the Hurricanes through the first two games. Zach also discusses how the depth and physicality have worked in the Hurricanes' favor, especially as the game went into double overtime on Monday night. Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on what could be legitimate concerns, despite being up 2-0 in the series. One of them is the star players of Andrei Svehcnikov and Seth Jarvis not being on the scoresheet yet. Regarding Jarvis, he has two shots through two games and seems like he's in his head. For Sevchnikov, he has 13 shots through the first couple of games, but have they been quality shots? Also, he took an unnecessary penalty that was thankfully killed off on the penalty kill. Could he be walking a thin line already with the officiating crew? Another concern is the quality of shot selection. While the Hurricanes are outshooting the Senators, are they making Linus Ullmark work, or just peppering him until something goes in? Finally, Zach concludes the show by talking about Spiros Anastas being named the 15th head coach in Chicago Wolves history. What was said by Anastas and the Hurricanes after the interim tag was removed? How does this benefit both the Wolves and Hurricanes? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: UK | 21st April, Tuesday - RIFT Affiliate Rewards Explained with Shavez
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 21st April, Tuesday - RIFT Affiliate Rewards Explained with Shavez 21/04/26
3FO – The Next-Generation Financial Ecosystem Powered by AI and DeFi

3FO is an innovative digital platform designed to redefine how individuals interact with modern finance. Built at the intersection of artificial intelligence, decentralized finance (DeFi), and blockchain transparency, 3FO provides users with powerful tools to participate in the evolving digital economy and explore new opportunities for wealth creation.

At the core of the 3FO ecosystem is its vision of financial empowerment through accessible technology. The platform combines advanced AI-driven strategies with decentralized infrastructure, enabling users to participate in automated yield systems without needing deep technical knowledge of trading or DeFi protocols.

One of the standout elements of 3FO is the Alpha AI Yield engine, an intelligent system designed to optimize digital asset strategies and manage yield generation across multiple decentralized protocols. By leveraging adaptive algorithms and diversified deployment strategies, Alpha AI continuously analyzes market conditions and allocates capital in ways intended to maximize efficiency and performance.

3FO also introduces an integrated financial framework that brings together several powerful components within one ecosystem. These include LQUIDPAY, a self-custodial DeFi banking environment that enables global transactions, crypto spending, and on-chain yield opportunities, and Protocol Yield, a performance-focused platform designed to provide transparent, traceable returns powered by decentralized financial strategies.

Another key feature of the platform is its emphasis on transparency and user control. Because the system operates on blockchain infrastructure, users can view earnings and transactions in real time, providing visibility into how digital assets move and generate yield across the network.

3FO is also built with scalability and collaboration in mind. Through its network-driven model, participants can expand their engagement within the ecosystem while benefiting from a structure designed to encourage shared growth and collective success.

With a focus on AI automation, decentralized finance innovation, and user-controlled digital banking, 3FO aims to create a comprehensive financial environment where technology works continuously to support smarter asset management and new economic opportunities.

As the global financial landscape evolves toward blockchain-based systems, 3FO positions itself as a forward-thinking platform that merges cutting-edge technology with accessible financial tools—empowering individuals to participate in the future of programmable money and decentralized wealth creation. 21/04/26

videos.title: Is P.J. Washington A Long-Term Fit With Cooper Flagg & Dallas Mavericks? | DLLS Mavs Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Is P.J. Washington A Long-Term Fit With Cooper Flagg & Dallas Mavericks? | DLLS Mavs Podcast Check out Fran Duffy’s 2026 Diehard Draft Guide! https://alldlls.com/draftguide26/

P.J. Washington had a mostly injury-plagued season with the Dallas Mavericks and therefore never really got to jell with rookie sensation Cooper Flagg. Tim Cato joins the DLLS Mavs crew to explore whether Washington is a long-term fit next to the budding star. Plus, we do a Tankathon spin and hear from Marc Stein with the latest on the NBA coaching carousel, live on YouTube.

videos.title: 💬 Multiple Calls: Moser Wins It in OT as Lightning Tie Series vs Canadiens! 🇨🇭 🚨
videos.summary_source_text:
💬 Multiple Calls: Moser Wins It in OT as Lightning Tie Series vs Canadiens! 🇨🇭 🚨 JJ Moser scores midway through overtime to lift the Tampa Bay Lightning to a 3-2 win over the Montreal Canadiens in Game 2 of their first-round series. The OT winner ties the series 1-1 and makes Moser the first Swiss defenseman in NHL history to score a playoff overtime game-winning goal—and just the fourth Swiss player ever to do it. Watch his clutch moment from the Lightning broadcast, the Canadiens broadcast, the US National broadcast, and the French-Canadien broadcast!

#nhl #hockey #swisshockey #tampabaylightning #switzerland #jjmoser JJ Moser scores midway through overtime to lift the Tampa Bay Lightning to a 3-2 win over the Montreal Canadiens in Game 2 of their first-round series. The OT winner ties the series 1-1 and makes Moser the first Swiss defenseman in NHL history to score a playoff overtime game-winning goal—and just the fourth Swiss player ever to do it. Watch his clutch moment from the Lightning broadcast, the Canadiens broadcast, the US National broadcast, and the French-Canadien broadcast!

videos.title: Don’t Shallow Like This #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text: Don’t Shallow Like This #golfswing #golftips Many golfers know they should shallow the club, but most do it the wrong way—by losing posture, thrusting hips, or rotating too early. The key move is a small shift forward in the downswing while allowing the arms to slide down the body and the hands to drop inside. This simple golf drill will help you make cleaner, more consistent contact and stop coming over the top. Practice this transition move from takeaway to downswing, and you’ll add power and consistency to your swing. videos.title: Claude Mythos Clone Shocks Anthropic and OpenAI
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude Mythos Clone Shocks Anthropic and OpenAI 👉 Try Higgsfield Marketing Studio here: https://higgsfield.ai/s/marketing-studio-airevolutionx-SjarQg
A twenty two year old developer just built something that feels a lot bigger than another open source AI project. OpenMythos is a testable attempt to recreate the logic behind the rumored Claude Mythos architecture, built around a Recurrent-Depth Transformer that reuses the same core layers again and again instead of just stacking more parameters. At the same time, Moonshot’s Kimi-K2.6 is pushing massive multi-agent modular AI, while xAI is rolling out cheap production-tested voice APIs through Grok. Across model design, reasoning, and real-world deployment, AI is starting to shift in a very different direction.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com
🚀 New Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@science.revolution

🧠 What You’ll See
0:00 Intro
0:23 OpenMythos and how a twenty two year old developer rebuilt a Claude Mythos style architecture as open source
SOURCE: https://www.marktechpost.com/2026/04/19/meet-openmythos-an-open-source-pytorch-reconstruction-of-claude-mythos-where-770m-parameters-match-a-1-3b-transformer/
1:01 Breakdown of the Recurrent-Depth Transformer design, looping structure, and Mixture-of-Experts routing
SOURCE: https://dataconomy.com/2026/04/20/openmythos-project-attempts-to-reconstruct-claude-mythos-design/
1:01 What Is a Recurrent-Depth Transformer
1:48 Prelude, Loop, Coda Architecture
2:34 Mixture of 384 Experts
5:14 770M Matches 1.3B Performance
5:33 Reasoning in Latent Space
6:40 Depth Extrapolation Test
7:12 Stability, Overthinking & Latent Attention
8:33 Scaling Shifts to Inference
9:02 Moonshot AI Kimi K2.6 model, agent swarm system, and benchmark claims against GPT 5.4 and Claude Opus 4.6
SOURCE: https://www.scmp.com/tech/big-tech/article/3350887/moonshot-ai-releases-flagship-model-open-source-push-continues
xAI launches Grok Speech to Text and Text to Speech APIs with aggressive pricing and real world deployment
SOURCE: https://www.marktechpost.com/2026/04/18/xai-launches-standalone-grok-speech-to-text-and-text-to-speech-apis-targeting-enterprise-voice-developers/

🚨 Why It Matters
This is bigger than one more open source model drop. OpenMythos points to a future where AI gets stronger by thinking longer during inference instead of just getting bigger, while Kimi-K2.6 and Grok show the same broader shift toward modularity, efficiency, and real-world deployment.

videos.title: This Is Why You Lose The Puck When Skating Backwards
videos.summary_source_text:
This Is Why You Lose The Puck When Skating Backwards The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.summary: This Is Why You Lose The Puck When Skating Backwards The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder. Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating.

FITTING TIPS FROM THE BEST PLAYERS IN THE GAME! Studs or Duds Recap

Personally I think this was the best series we’ve brought to the channel so let’s highlight the best pieces of advice from some of the greatest players to ever play this game.

Scottie Scheffler kicks it off as we reveal some behind the scenes pieces we couldn’t include in the individual episodes. 

Studs or Duds puts the players through a challenge where they have to adjust to a set of golf clubs that are the polar opposite to what they use week in week out on tour. 

The advice comes thick and fast but the sentiment remains the same. GET FIT FOR YOUR GOLF CLUBS!

If you want me to fit you the get on this link:

https://pages.thetrott.shop/tour-fitting-experience-booking-price

The Trott Shop booking system officially opens today so get in the link and let’s get you dialed.

videos.title: Can’t Breathe Through Your Nose? Do This Now
videos.summary_source_text:
Can’t Breathe Through Your Nose? Do This Now Struggling with a blocked nose or sinus pressure? Try this simple technique that can help open your nasal passages in seconds. Using the heel of your hand, gently press into the area between your eyebrows and lift upward, then follow by applying light traction to the top of the nose and pulling downward. This helps stimulate key pressure points, improve circulation, and reduce congestion so you can breathe more freely almost instantly. You may feel relief right away as airflow improves and pressure begins to release. This is a quick, natural technique you can do anytime to support clearer breathing and sinus comfort. Try it now and feel the difference.

*********************************

videos.title: The Key To A Complete Backswing #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
The Key To A Complete Backswing #golfswing #golftips Many golfers never reach a full shoulder turn — not because they’re stiff, but because they start too open at setup.
Think about it like this; If you begin with your shoulders 20° open, you’ve already lost part of your turn before you even start.
By squaring up to 0° and turning fully back to 90°, you’ll create more coil, more power, and better consistency.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. Many golfers never reach a full shoulder turn — not because they’re stiff, but because they start too open at setup.

videos.title: Stop Using Weight Transfers
videos.summary_source_text:
Stop Using Weight Transfers The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body’s own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness.
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

How to hit driver straight and increase your driver distance: fix your weak right shots with 3 proven club face checkpoints — stop leaking distance and start hitting it pure.

In This Video, You'll Discover:
• How to hit driver straighter by understanding exactly why the ball leaks weak and right — and the one root cause most golfers never identify
• The "tilt it down" move that closes the club face at three critical positions in your driver swing, mirroring what PGATour pros actually do
• How an open club face silently converts your driver into a 5-wood — and how to reclaim your driver distance with a single swing adjustment
• Three progressive golf drills you can test one at a time to isolate your exact fault and fix it on the range today
• A simple alignment setup using a start line stick and pool noodle — the golf swing tip that ensures aim is never secretly costing you fairways
• How to check your grip so a weak hand position doesn't undo every other golf swing fix you make
• Golf swing analysis straight from Eric Cogorno showing exactly what Xander Schauffele, Patrick Cantlay, and Max Homa do at each checkpoint

If you're a high handicap golfer frustrated by a driver that leaks right and comes up short, this golf lesson gives you a clear, step-by-step system to fix it. Eric Cogorno breaks the problem down into three testable checkpoints — takeaway, last parallel, and follow-through — so you can identify exactly where your club face is going wrong and correct it one piece at a time. This is the same cause-and-effect golf swing analysis framework built into the Swing Coach AI app, which gives you instant audio feedback after every swing so your practice actually sticks. As your golf swing coach, Eric also covers two pre-swing setup keys — alignment and grip — so nothing in your how to play golf fundamentals is quietly working against you. Watch Eric's grip video linked at the end to complete the fix.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators

• Some of the world’s best golf courses

• Bryson DeChambeau

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

• Amazing golf courses

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par.

videos.title: MARTY MAGIC! Jordan Martinook Gives the Carolina Hurricanes a 2-0 Series Lead After Double OT Goal!
videos.summary_source_text:
MARTY MAGIC! Jordan Martinook Gives the Carolina Hurricanes a 2-0 Series Lead After Double OT Goal! The Carolina Hurricanes secure the 2-0 series lead after Jordan Martinook's double OT heroics! What stood out in the win, and what did Jordan Staal say after the game? On the Tuesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach shares his thoughts on the Hurricanes' Game 2 win. What stood out in the win that saw a goal get reversed in overtime, a slew of missed penalties, a 2-0 lead becoming a 2-2 game, and a double OT winner? How does Jordan Martinook continue to become a folklore hero when needed most, especially in the playoffs? Secondly, Zach reacts to what Jordan Staal said postgame. How did the captain feel about the game overall, and about Martinook's huge goal to give the Hurricanes a 2-0 series lead? Finally, Zach concludes the show by sharing his thoughts on the first two games overall. How has the early part of the series given him a sense that the Hurricanes will take this series, regardless of how it goes in Ottawa for Games 3 and 4? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes
