videos.title: The ONE FOOD That Shrinks an Enlarged Prostate
videos.summary_source_text:
The ONE FOOD That Shrinks an Enlarged Prostate Find out about the number one food that may help shrink an enlarged prostate naturally. You’ll want to add this food to your diet today!

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

DATA:
https://patents.google.com/patent/CN1736396A/en
https://patents.justia.com/patent/9610255

0:00 Introduction: How to shrink an enlarged prostate naturally 
0:34 Enlarged prostate causes 
2:37 Lycopene
2:53 The best food for an enlarged prostate
3:47 Other remedies for an enlarged prostate 
 
In this video, we’re going to talk about one food that may help stop prostate enlargement in its tracks. The prostate gland wraps around a small tube underneath the bladder and is usually the size of a walnut. When a prostate is enlarged, it can interfere with urine flow and can sometimes turn cancerous.

An enlarged prostate is also called benign prostatic hyperplasia. Testosterone is said to cause prostate enlargement. With the help of an enzyme, testosterone is converted into DHT (dihydrotestosterone), a more potent form of testosterone. One of the best-selling drugs for prostate enlargement works by inhibiting this enzyme.  

Testosterone and DHT decrease as we age, but the enzyme that makes DHT increases.

The top medication for an enlarged prostate decreases the enlargement of the prostate by 23%, but it also comes with the following potential side effects:
• Decreased libido
• Increased risk of prostate cancer
• Syndrome upon quitting the medicine (suicidal impulses, atrophy of the penis, development of breast tissue)

There is a natural inhibitor of this enzyme, called lycopene, that may decrease the risk of prostate enlargement by 21%. It may also reduce the risk of prostate cancer and decrease inflammation. It even has potent antioxidant effects.  

Lycopene is a carotenoid found in watermelon, carrots, and grapefruit, but tomatoes are the best source. 

Try growing your own tomatoes or getting them from the farmer’s market. You can also consume canned tomatoes, tomato sauce, or tomato paste because the lycopene in tomatoes becomes more bioavailable when heated. Make sure you choose tomato sauce without sugar!

Lycopene is a fat-soluble compound, so add olive oil when cooking with tomatoes to help extract it. Try adding tomatoes to your diet twice a week to help shrink an enlarged prostate.

Zinc and resveratrol are also helpful enlarged prostate remedies. Milk is one of the worst things for an enlarged prostate!

videos.title: Vladar's 1st career playoff shutout stakes Flyers to 2-0 series lead! 🇨🇿🔥
videos.summary_source_text:
Vladar's 1st career playoff shutout stakes Flyers to 2-0 series lead! 🇨🇿🔥 "Vladar" translates to "ruler" in Czech, and the Philadelphia backstop is certainly the king of the crease in Game 2! Vladar stops all 27 shots the Penguins throw his way, becoming just the 2nd Flyers' goalie to register a playoff shutout against Pittsburgh (behind Martin Biron in Game 5 of the 2009 Eastern Conference Quarterfinals). Vladar's heroics help his Flyers establish a 2-0 series lead over their Pennsylvania rivals, earning him the 1st star of the game!

videos.title: UK | 20th April, Monday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 20th April, Monday - RIFT Presentation 20/04/26
3FO – The Next-Generation Financial Ecosystem Powered by AI and DeFi

3FO is an innovative digital platform designed to redefine how individuals interact with modern finance. Built at the intersection of artificial intelligence, decentralized finance (DeFi), and blockchain transparency, 3FO provides users with powerful tools to participate in the evolving digital economy and explore new opportunities for wealth creation.

At the core of the 3FO ecosystem is its vision of financial empowerment through accessible technology. The platform combines advanced AI-driven strategies with decentralized infrastructure, enabling users to participate in automated yield systems without needing deep technical knowledge of trading or DeFi protocols.

One of the standout elements of 3FO is the Alpha AI Yield engine, an intelligent system designed to optimize digital asset strategies and manage yield generation across multiple decentralized protocols. By leveraging adaptive algorithms and diversified deployment strategies, Alpha AI continuously analyzes market conditions and allocates capital in ways intended to maximize efficiency and performance.

3FO also introduces an integrated financial framework that brings together several powerful components within one ecosystem. These include LQUIDPAY, a self-custodial DeFi banking environment that enables global transactions, crypto spending, and on-chain yield opportunities, and Protocol Yield, a performance-focused platform designed to provide transparent, traceable returns powered by decentralized financial strategies.

Another key feature of the platform is its emphasis on transparency and user control. Because the system operates on blockchain infrastructure, users can view earnings and transactions in real time, providing visibility into how digital assets move and generate yield across the network.

3FO is also built with scalability and collaboration in mind. Through its network-driven model, participants can expand their engagement within the ecosystem while benefiting from a structure designed to encourage shared growth and collective success.

With a focus on AI automation, decentralized finance innovation, and user-controlled digital banking, 3FO aims to create a comprehensive financial environment where technology works continuously to support smarter asset management and new economic opportunities.

As the global financial landscape evolves toward blockchain-based systems, 3FO positions itself as a forward-thinking platform that merges cutting-edge technology with accessible financial tools—empowering individuals to participate in the future of programmable money and decentralized wealth creation. 20/04/26

videos.title: Hindi | 20th April, Monday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi | 20th April, Monday - RIFT Presentation 20/04/26
3FO – The Next-Generation Financial Ecosystem Powered by AI and DeFi

3FO is an innovative digital platform designed to redefine how individuals interact with modern finance. Built at the intersection of artificial intelligence, decentralized finance (DeFi), and blockchain transparency, 3FO provides users with powerful tools to participate in the evolving digital economy and explore new opportunities for wealth creation.

At the core of the 3FO ecosystem is its vision of financial empowerment through accessible technology. The platform combines advanced AI-driven strategies with decentralized infrastructure, enabling users to participate in automated yield systems without needing deep technical knowledge of trading or DeFi protocols.

One of the standout elements of 3FO is the Alpha AI Yield engine, an intelligent system designed to optimize digital asset strategies and manage yield generation across multiple decentralized protocols. By leveraging adaptive algorithms and diversified deployment strategies, Alpha AI continuously analyzes market conditions and allocates capital in ways intended to maximize efficiency and performance.

3FO also introduces an integrated financial framework that brings together several powerful components within one ecosystem. These include LQUIDPAY, a self-custodial DeFi banking environment that enables global transactions, crypto spending, and on-chain yield opportunities, and Protocol Yield, a performance-focused platform designed to provide transparent, traceable returns powered by decentralized financial strategies.

Another key feature of the platform is its emphasis on transparency and user control. Because the system operates on blockchain infrastructure, users can view earnings and transactions in real time, providing visibility into how digital assets move and generate yield across the network.

3FO is also built with scalability and collaboration in mind. Through its network-driven model, participants can expand their engagement within the ecosystem while benefiting from a structure designed to encourage shared growth and collective success.

With a focus on AI automation, decentralized finance innovation, and user-controlled digital banking, 3FO aims to create a comprehensive financial environment where technology works continuously to support smarter asset management and new economic opportunities.

As the global financial landscape evolves toward blockchain-based systems, 3FO positions itself as a forward-thinking platform that merges cutting-edge technology with accessible financial tools—empowering individuals to participate in the future of programmable money and decentralized wealth creation. 20/04/26

videos.title: What Adjustments Will the Avalanche Make in Game 2 Against the Los Angeles Kings?
videos.summary_source_text:
What Adjustments Will the Avalanche Make in Game 2 Against the Los Angeles Kings? Colorado Avalanche eye a commanding 2–0 series lead over the Los Angeles Kings—will increased net-front presence and lineup tweaks be the difference? Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down Game 1’s narrow 2–1 win, spotlighting Arturri Lehkonen’s gritty goals and the need for more bodies in front of Kings goalie Forsberg. With 30 shots on goal but tight Kings defense, can Jared Bednar’s squad turn puck possession into high-danger chances?

Key Avalanche talking points include potential line changes involving Ross Colton, the fourth line’s energy led by Logan O’Connor, and goalie Scott Wedgewood’s strong case to start again. The hosts analyze power play struggles, discuss Gabe Landeskog’s optimal line placement, and debate how physical battles against the Kings could set the tone. With fans demanding more production from Nathan MacKinnon and anticipating fireworks between Landeskog and Adrian Kempe, Avalanche Nation wonders—can Colorado impose their fast, physical style to take control of the series?

videos.title: Try This Barefoot Test for 60 Seconds — You’ll Feel It Right Away
videos.summary_source_text:
Try This Barefoot Test for 60 Seconds — You’ll Feel It Right Away Most people go through their entire day without realizing that one of the most powerful systems in their body has slowly been turned down, and it starts right at the bottom of their feet. In this video, you’re going to experience what happens when you reconnect your feet to the ground, even for just 60 seconds. The bottom of your feet are filled with thousands of nerve endings that constantly communicate with your brain, helping control balance, coordination, posture, and even how your joints move. When your feet are confined in cushioned shoes all day, that signal becomes weaker, forcing your body to compensate, which can contribute to instability, poor movement patterns, and added stress on the knees, hips, and lower back. By taking your shoes off and performing a few simple movements, you’ll begin to feel changes in real time, including improved awareness, better balance, increased muscle activation, and enhanced circulation. This is not about avoiding shoes completely, but about restoring a connection that your body was designed to have. These simple barefoot techniques can help reawaken your proprioceptive system, support better movement, and reduce unnecessary strain throughout the body. Try these exercises, feel the difference for yourself, and begin to understand how something so simple can have a powerful impact on your overall health and function.

*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

NO flour, NO yeast, and NO sugar! Healthy mug bread in 5 minutes (+ baking). Low-carb. NO flour, NO yeast, and NO sugar! Healthy mug bread in 5 minutes (+ baking). Low-carb. Delicious, quick, and super easy. Enjoy healthy recipes.

3 eggs.
1 cup (240 ml) kefir.
1/4 cup (60 g) psyllium husk.
1/2 cup (80 g) walnuts. 1/3 cup (60 g) sunflower seeds.
1/4 cup (50 g) flax seeds.
Salt.
Sweet paprika powder. Ground black pepper.
Olive oil.
Sesame seeds.
Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F (200°C) for about 60 minutes.
1 avocado.
1 tomato.
Fresh parsley.
Salt.
Garlic powder. Ground black pepper.
Olive oil.

videos.summary_source_text:
GPT-Rosalind Explained: OpenAI’s First Vertical AI That Beat 95% of Experts Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
OpenAI just released GPT-Rosalind, a specialized AI model built for biology, genomics, and drug discovery—and it’s already outperforming human experts in certain tasks.

In this video, we break down what GPT-Rosalind actually is, how it works, and why this marks a major shift from general AI to vertical AI models. From drug discovery and protein engineering to multi-step research automation, this model isn’t just answering questions—it’s acting like a real AI research assistant.

We also dive into benchmarks, architecture, safety concerns, and why this could reshape industries beyond healthcare—including finance, law, and manufacturing.

If you want to understand the future of AI specialization, enterprise AI, and scientific discovery, this is a must-watch.

videos.title: Why the Pros Make Driver Look Effortless (And Most Golfers Don’t)
videos.summary_source_text:
Why the Pros Make Driver Look Effortless (And Most Golfers Don’t) Stop wasting time working on the wrong things.  Take our free 7-question Game Assessment and discover the #1 thing you need to work on to improve your game.  👉 https://meandmygolf.com/game-plan/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=16.04.26

Why does the driver feel so hard… when the pros make it look effortless?
In this lesson with Ally, we break down two key areas that made a huge difference to both her accuracy and distance.
First, we looked at something most golfers struggle with squaring the clubface. A small change to how the club releases through impact helped Ally hit it straighter and more consistently, with an immediate improvement in strike.
But that was only part of it.
We then worked on how she was coiling in the backswing - how she loads into her trail side to create speed more efficiently. And this is where things really changed.
The swing didn’t feel more powerful…
it actually felt more effortless, but the club head speed increased again.
If your driver feels like hard work, or you feel like you have to try harder to get distance, this lesson will help you understand what might really be going on.

videos.title: Claude Design Explained: From Prompt to Code (95% Accuracy, 200K Context Window)
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude Design Explained: From Prompt to Code (95% Accuracy, 200K Context Window) Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Claude Design just dropped—and it might be the biggest shift in AI design tools yet.

Instead of just generating images, Claude Design actually learns your entire brand system—colors, fonts, components—and then creates visuals that feel like they were made by your own design team.

In this video, we break down exactly how Claude Design works, from onboarding your brand assets to generating real-time designs and exporting production-ready code. We also compare it to ChatGPT and Gemini to see where it actually wins—and where it doesn’t.

If you’re a founder, developer, marketer, or creator, this could completely change how you build pitch decks, UI designs, and visual content.

By the end, you’ll know whether Claude Design is worth adding to your workflow—or just another AI hype cycle.

⏱️ Timestamps

00:00 – Introduction
01:17 – What Is Claude Design?
02:45 – How Claude Design Works (Step-by-Step)
04:29 – What Can Claude Design Actually Do?
04:51 – Who Is Claude Design For?
06:17 – Real Industry Use Cases
08:45 – Claude vs ChatGPT vs Gemini (Full Comparison)
10:41 – Risks, Ethics & What to Watch Out For
11:54 – What’s Coming Next

videos.title: What Makes The 'Perfect' F1 Driver? | F1 Nation Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
What Makes The 'Perfect' F1 Driver? | F1 Nation Podcast Verstappen's mentality? Schumacher's teamwork? Alonso's intelligence? Tsunoda's physique? Tom Clarkson is joined by former F1 driver Jolyon Palmer and IndyCar race winner James Hinchcliffe to build the ‘perfect’ F1 driver.

They debate the key attributes needed to become the best in the pinnacle of motorsport and which drivers from past and present are closest to perfection.

Plus, the guys chat about the possible driver market ramifications if Max Verstappen does leave Red Bull Racing and they share their standout moments from the Bahrain and Saudi Arabian Grands Prix over the years.

00:00 - Building the 'perfect' F1 driver
06:03 - Attitude + mentality 
11:02 - Teamwork + personality
17:44 - Intelligence
24:24 - Raw racing talent
30:57 - Alonso at Ferrari? Rookie Hamilton? 93 Senna? Who was closest to 'perfect'?
38:19 - Max's future + the 2027 driver market
43:59 - The best races in Bahrain + Saudi Arabia

videos.title: Är Lysa sämre än en enskild fond?
videos.summary_source_text:
Är Lysa sämre än en enskild fond? ⚠️ Viktig info:

Detta innehåll är inte individuell investeringsrådgivning. Ett sparande i linje med forskningens rekommendationer har historiskt sett varit framgångsrikt. Det finns mycket som talar för att så även kommer vara framgent, men det finns inga garantier. Historisk avkastning är ingen garanti för framtida avkastning. Alla investeringar innebär risk och kan både öka och minska i värde. Investera inte pengar du inte har råd att förlora. Mer info på rikatillsammans.se.

Författat av Jan Bolmeson per publicerat datum. Vi äger själva andelar i globala indexfonder samt Lysa som nämns. Vi är fristående från nämnda bolag och värdepapper; ingen ersättning har utgått om ej annat anges ovan. Vi avser inte följa upp detta innehåll. ⚠️ Viktig info:

videos.title: Stop Shifting Your Weight — Do This Instead
videos.summary_source_text:
Stop Shifting Your Weight — Do This Instead Most golfers are told to “shift their weight” in the golf swing… but that’s not actually what’s happening.

In this video, I break down the key difference between weight shift vs pressure shift — and why focusing on pressure (not weight) can completely change how you move, strike the ball, and control your swing.

It might sound surprising at first, but once you understand it, it makes the golf swing feel much more natural and repeatable.

If you’ve ever struggled with balance, consistency, or timing, this could be the missing piece.

What you’ll learn:

The difference between weight shift and pressure shift
Why most golfers get this wrong
How to move pressure correctly in your swing
A simple way to improve contact and consistency

Let me know in the comments if this changes how you think about your swing 👇

videos.title: Why we Don’t Call This a Crossover
videos.summary_source_text:
Why we Don’t Call This a Crossover The Cross-under (Not Crossover): Why the under step Is everything.

Most coaches teach the crossover by focusing on the over step. We focus on the under step  because that’s where the real power and mechanical leverage come from.

In this video I break down the 4 things that actually make a cross-under work:

1) Step size: MacKinnon’s bigger, more explosive rhythm vs. McDavid’s smaller, higher cadence step.

2) Cadence: How to switch between styles, speeds and rhythms based on the game situation.

3)The Rocker: Landing at the heel with proper shin angle, then rockering heel to toe underneath your center of mass.

4) Staying lose: Flexible ankles (Y-angle), tilting and rotating hips, and being able to separate the upper and lower body with rotation.

This is the foundational mechanic behind the top skaters you watch crossover at speed. The Cross-under (Not Crossover): Why the under step Is everything.

Most coaches teach the crossover by focusing on the over step. We focus on the under step  because that’s where the real power and mechanical leverage come from.

In this video I break down the 4 things that actually make a cross-under work:

1) Step size: MacKinnon’s bigger, more explosive rhythm vs. McDavid’s smaller, higher cadence step.

2) Cadence: How to switch between styles, speeds and rhythms based on the game situation.

3)The Rocker: Landing at the heel with proper shin angle, then rockering heel to toe underneath your center of mass.

4) Staying lose: Flexible ankles (Y-angle), tilting and rotating hips, and being able to separate the upper and lower body with rotation.

This is the foundational mechanic behind the top skaters you watch crossover at speed.

videos.title: Matt's Chocolate Chip Cookies - godaste jag bakat!
videos.summary_source_text:
Matt's Chocolate Chip Cookies - godaste jag bakat! Matt Adlards recept på chocolate chip cookies är det bästa jag någonsin testat - sega inuti, frasiga utanpå och så underbar smak att man kan leva på en diet uteslutande på dem.

Matts bok "The Science of Baking" hittar du här:
https://www.amazon.se/Science-Baking-Everything-Perfect-Savoury/dp/0241713935/

Matt Adlards Instagramkonto finns här: https://www.instagram.com/mattadlard/

*Chocolate Chip Cookies - ingredienser*
275 g vetemjöl
185 g kylskåpskallt smör - 80 g bryner du, 105 g g ner i bunken.
5 g bikarbonat
3.5 g bakpulver
3 g salt
130 g strösocker
160 g brunt socker (jag körde med ljust muskovadosocker)
60 g ägg (oftast ett normalstort)
180 g choklad (mer mörkare än ljus för att få bra kontrast mot kakans sötma)

Grädda i 155 grader i nyare varmluftsugn, annars 165 grader. 
Räkna med 15-18 minuter. 
Låt svalna på galler. 

Jag har inga som helst kommersiella samarbeten med Matt, Amazon eller någon kopplad till Matt. Det är bara en jäkla bra bok, inte svårare än så.

• How to check your grip so a weak hand position doesn't undo every other golf swing fix you make
• Golf swing analysis straight from Eric Cogorno showing exactly what Xander Schauffele, Patrick Cantlay, and Max Homa do at each checkpoint

If you're a high handicap golfer frustrated by a driver that leaks right and comes up short, this golf lesson gives you a clear, step-by-step system to fix it. Eric Cogorno breaks the problem down into three testable checkpoints — takeaway, last parallel, and follow-through — so you can identify exactly where your club face is going wrong and correct it one piece at a time. This is the same cause-and-effect golf swing analysis framework built into the Swing Coach AI app, which gives you instant audio feedback after every swing so your practice actually sticks. As your golf swing coach, Eric also covers two pre-swing setup keys — alignment and grip — so nothing in your how to play golf fundamentals is quietly working against you. videos.title: Nytt system för återbetalning av IEEPA-tullar lanseras i USA
videos.summary_source_text:
Nytt system för återbetalning av IEEPA-tullar lanseras i USA U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) har precis lanserat Fas 1 av förfarandet som ska möjliggöra återbetalning av de s.k. IEEPA-tullarna i USA. Detta ska göras via ett nytt verktyg CAPE (Consolidated Administration and Processing of Entries), som öppnar den 20 april 2026. 

Vad bör ni göra nu och vad är viktigt att veta? Lyssna in till PwC:s experter Sara Lörenskog och Kaspar Kjellberg som går igenom detta mer i detalj!

Läs mer här om International Emergency Economic Powers Act (IEEPA) Duty Refunds: https://www.cbp.gov/trade/programs-administration/trade-remedies/ieepa-duty-refunds

Besök även: https://www.pwc.se/ U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) har precis lanserat Fas 1 av förfarandet som ska möjliggöra återbetalning av de s.k. IEEPA-tullarna i USA. I SLAM DUNKED IT...👀⛳️ Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

LIMITED EDITION MERCH (UK & US)
My new limited edition merch is now available — thanks so much for the incredible support!
UK viewers: https://uk.rickshiels.com
US viewers: https://us.rickshiels.com

MORE FROM ME
🎙 Podcast — The Rick Shiels Golf Show
https://www.youtube.com/@RickShielsGolfShow
🏌️‍♂️Golf equipment reviews — H.I.T Golf
Honest, independent testing of the latest drivers, irons, putters, golf balls and tech.
https://www.youtube.com/@HITGolfReviews

OFFICIAL PARTNERS

ECCO — my official footwear partner:
https://golf.ecco.com

Redvanly — premium golf apparel partners:
https://www.redvanly.com/pages/gift-guide?utm_source=rickshiels&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025giftguide

FOLLOW ME ⬇️
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/RickShielsPGA/
X: https://twitter.com/RickShielsPGA
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rickshielspga/
Website: http://www.rickshiels.com/

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

LIMITED EDITION MERCH (UK & US)
My new limited edition merch is now available — thanks so much for the incredible support!

videos.title: FREDDIE WAS READY! Carolina Hurricanes Start Round 1 with a Shutout
videos.summary_source_text:
FREDDIE WAS READY! Carolina Hurricanes Start Round 1 with a Shutout The Carolina Hurricanes shut out the Ottawa Senators in Game 1, 2-0 on Saturday afternoon.  Freddier Andersen with his sixth playoff shutout, and the second line tallied six points in the win. What were the big takeaways from the win to kick off the series on a high note? On the Monday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach shares his thoughts on the Hurricanes' Game 1 win. Jordan Staal set the tone with his opening faceoff fight win over Brady Tkachuk. It led the Hurricanes to be physical and outhit the Senators all game. They were on a mission to hit everything that moved while playing their style of game. While it was only 2-0, it was a great way to start the series. Furthermore, the second line of Taylor Hall, Logan Stankoven, and Jacks on Blake showed why they've been one of the most underrated lines in the NHL. Andersen also stood on his head as he collected another playoff shutout. Secondly, Zach reacts to what Rod Brind'Amour said postgame on Saturday after the win. How did the head coach feel about his team's performance in Game 1? Finally, Zach concludes the show by previewing Game 2 on Monday night. What is he keeping an eye on, and what are the storylines going into the second game of the series? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: K63. Deklarera bostadsförsäljningen rätt – avdrag, grundförbättringar och uppskov
videos.summary_source_text:
K63. Deklarera bostadsförsäljningen rätt – avdrag, grundförbättringar och uppskov För 90 procent av alla deklarationer är allting redan förtryckt och klart. Det handlar oftast bara om att titta igenom, kontrollera att inget är fel och sedan godkänna. Därför blir det här ett avsnitt med Joakim Lindholm på Lexly som är expert på deklaration med fokus på bostadsförsäljning där det ofta finns avdrag att göra. Det här är ett sådant avsnitt att bokmärka och återkomma till nästa gång du ska sälja en bostad.

Sex punkter som stack ut för mig:

1. Du har rätt att göra avdrag även utan kvitton
Många blir onödigt rädda för sina avdrag när de saknar kvitton eller är osäkra på exakta belopp. Men har du genomfört en avdragsgill åtgärd har du rätten att göra avdraget – det enda du riskerar är att Skatteverket ifrågasätter dig. Värsta utfallet är att du får dra tillbaka ansökan, inte att du straffas.

2. Grundförbättringar är avdragsgilla för alltid – vanligt underhåll bara i fem år
Det finns två kategorier av renoveringsavdrag och skillnaden är avgörande. Grundförbättringar – det vill säga åtgärder som är nya eller objektivt bättre – är avdragsgilla till 100 procent utan tidsgräns. Vanligt underhåll som återställer något till tidigare skick är bara avdragsgillt under de senaste fem åren räknat från försäljningsdatumet.

3. Det är mellanskillnaden som avgör vad som räknas som grundförbättring
Om du byter ut ett kök mot ett av bättre kvalitet är det inte en ren grundförbättring, men en del av kostnaden är det. Mellanskillnaden mellan vad en ren återställning hade kostat och vad du faktiskt betalade – den delen räknas som grundförbättring och är alltid avdragsgill. Det gäller att gå igenom vad som faktiskt utförts och räkna noga.

4. Nyproduktion – du kan inte förbättra bortom ursprungsskicket
För nyproduktion gäller att fastigheten är i sitt bästa tänkbara skick direkt efter byggnation. Det innebär att vanliga åtgärder som ommålning eller tapetsering inte ger avdragsrätt, eftersom du inte kan förbättra bortom ursprungsskicket. Objektiva förbättringar – som att installera en diskmaskin där det saknades – räknas däremot fortfarande.

5. Taxeringsvärdet avgör om det är köp eller gåva
När en fastighet byter ägare inom familjen till reducerat pris är taxeringsvärdet den avgörande tröskeln. Överstiger köpeskillingen taxeringsvärdet måste transaktionen klassas som ett köp – att kalla det något annat är ett skattebrott. Understiger priset taxeringsvärdet kan parterna däremot välja att skriva det som en gåva, men tänk på att köparen då tar över den latenta skatteskulden.

6. Det värsta som kan hända är att du får avslag
Ett sista medskick från Joakim är att  det sällan finns ett absolut rätt eller fel i tolkningsfrågor kring avdrag. Skatteverket granskar, ifrågasätter och för ett samtal – och du har alltid rätten att argumentera för din sak. Ju bättre dokumentation och förberedelse du har, desto starkare position har du i den dialogen. Det värsta som kan hända - om du varit tydlig i kommunikationen och inte gett en oriktig uppgift - är att du får avslag utan skattetillägg. 

Hoppas att du gillar avsnittet!
Jan och Joakim

Länkar:
====
▸ Ta hjälp av Lexly med deklaration av bostadsförsäljning: https://lexly.se/privatavtal/deklarationshjalp
▸ Diskussionen till avsnittet: https://rikatillsammans.se/forum/t/120760

====

00:02:00 - De flesta avdrag är redan förifyllda
00:03:24 - Vad som gäller vid försäljning av bostad
00:06:12 - Hur vinst vid bostadsförsäljning beräknas
00:08:24 - Två typer av renoveringsavdrag för bostad
00:09:21 - Exempel med avdrag för köksrenovering
00:13:09 - Fler exempel på grundförbättringar
00:14:57 - Uppskovsregler: skjut upp beskattningen när du köper ny bostad
00:17:30 - Bodelning vid skilsmässa
00:18:18 - Kontinuitetsprincipen för bostäder

00:23:15 - Försäljning under marknadsvärde och påverkan på taxeringsvärde
00:26:27 - Dokumentation utan kvitton: hur man kan tänka
00:29:06 - Fritidshus vs permanentbostad gällande avdrag För 90 procent av alla deklarationer är allting redan förtryckt och klart. videos.title: BMW, Audi eller Zeekr: Vem ger mest elbil för pengarna 2026?
videos.summary_source_text:
BMW, Audi eller Zeekr: Vem ger mest elbil för pengarna 2026? Hur kan det skilja 19 mil i räckvidd mellan tre av marknadens hetaste elbilar? I det här testet ställer jag BMW, Audi och utmanaren Zeekr mot varandra i en stenhård granskning av räckvidd, teknik och faktiskt värde för pengarna. Vi har hört löftena om snabb laddning och långa räckvidder enligt WLTP – men vad händer när vi kör bilarna sida vid sida i verkliga svenska förhållanden?

Resultatet är inget annat än en chock. Att en bil i premiumsegmentet kan leverera 19 mil extra räckvidd jämfört med sina konkurrenter kan förändra allt hela för dig som ska välja tjänstebil eller privatleasing 2026.

BMW iX3 har hyllats som den bästa el-suven, men räcker det när Audi sänker priset på nya Q6 e-tron och kinesiska Zeekr 7X dundrar in med maximal utrustning och extrem laddning? Jag tar tempen på de tre hetaste utmanarna just nu.

videos.title: Avalanche Grind Out Game 1 Win Over Kings
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Grind Out Game 1 Win Over Kings Colorado Avalanche outlast Los Angeles Kings in a grinding 2-1 Game 1 victory—proof that this first-round NHL playoff series could turn into a battle of endurance and physicality. Can the Avalanche’s adaptability and Scott Wedgewood’s stellar goaltending carry them past a Kings team determined to dictate play with heavy hits and tight defense?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down the nuanced chess match between the Avalanche’s offensive versatility and the Kings’ gritty, shutdown style. The hosts spotlight Artturi Lehkonen’s net-front prowess, Wedgewood’s clutch postseason debut, and key moments like a controversial disallowed goal and Drew Doughty’s missed backhander. The discussion raises questions about possible lineup adjustments—does Ross Colton get back in for Game 2?—and explores the tactical shifts Jared Bednar and the Avalanche might deploy to grab control of the series. Will Colorado’s depth and adaptability prove decisive as tensions rise?

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 4 | RBC Heritage | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 4 | RBC Heritage | 2026 PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 4 | RBC Heritage | 2026
 
Check out all the best shots from the final round of the 2026 RBC Heritage, featuring Scottie Scheffler, Matt Fitzpatrick, Gary Woodland and Rickie Fowler, among others.

Fresh off The Masters, where Rory McIlroy went back-to-back to join an elite group of repeat champions, the PGA TOUR heads to the Lowcountry for the RBC Heritage at Harbour Town Golf Links. This Signature Event features a no-cut field and a loaded lineup, highlighted by defending champion Justin Thomas, who returns after his dramatic playoff win in 2025. World No. 1 Scottie Scheffler arrives off a runner-up finish at Augusta and looks to add another Harbour Town title, while Cameron Young brings serious momentum after a T3 at the Masters and a win at THE PLAYERS Championship. Keep an eye on Matt Fitzpatrick, already a winner this spring, and Jordan Spieth, a past champion with a strong track record at Harbour Town. Meanwhile, Collin Morikawa returns after a solid showing at Augusta, and Xander Schauffele continues a run of consistent form. Don’t overlook FedExCup contender Jacob Bridgeman, who’s been one of the breakout performers of the season, or Max Homa, who had another strong major showing. With a stacked field, no cut, and one of the TOUR’s most iconic layouts, Harbour Town sets the stage for another high-level week on the PGA TOUR.

videos.title: Agent Swarms Is One of The Most Powerful AI System Yet
videos.summary_source_text:
Agent Swarms Is One of The Most Powerful AI System Yet Abacus AI just showed something that feels a lot bigger than another flashy AI demo. Agent Swarms inside ChatLLM and Deep Agent takes one large prompt, breaks it into structured sub-tasks, assigns them to specialized agents, and then delivers outputs that actually feel coordinated. Across these demos, it builds apps, creates presentations, runs research, connects to outside tools, and handles complex workflows in a way that starts looking a lot closer to real team execution than a normal chatbot.

Watch until the end to discover which form stands out above the rest.

videos.title: One Handful Before Bed… Wake Up Feeling Different
videos.summary_source_text:
One Handful Before Bed… Wake Up Feeling Different Most people focus on what they eat during the day, but what you give your body before sleep can make a powerful difference in how you recover overnight. Pumpkin seeds are loaded with magnesium, a key mineral that helps calm the nervous system, relax muscles, and lower stress hormones like cortisol. They also contain tryptophan, which supports the production of serotonin and melatonin, helping regulate your sleep cycle naturally. In addition, pumpkin seeds provide zinc, healthy fats, and antioxidants that support immune function, tissue repair, and reduce inflammation while you sleep. When your body has the right nutrients at the right time, it can repair, reset, and function more efficiently. Try a small handful about 30 to 60 minutes before bed and pay attention to how you feel in the morning. Simple habit, powerful effect.

*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

videos.title: The One Technique That Helps My Patients Overcome Deep-Rooted Addictions
videos.summary_source_text:
The One Technique That Helps My Patients Overcome Deep-Rooted Addictions In this clip, I share the single most powerful technique I've used to help my patients break lifelong addictions to sugar, carbs, and unhealthy routines while naturally lowering their blood pressure and transforming their health. As a practicing cardiologist, I've learned that willpower alone isn't enough, and I explain why just 10 minutes of daily silence can rewire your relationship with your thoughts, activate your parasympathetic nervous system, and give you the freedom to make real lifestyle changes. I walk you through exactly how to practice this technique at home, why it works on a biological level, and the remarkable transformations I've witnessed in my own patients, from 100-pound weight losses to extended fasts and reversed hypertension. If you've ever felt stuck, addicted, or unable to follow through on the healthy changes you know you need to make, this clip gives you the missing tool I wish someone had taught me years ago.

Click the link to watch the full video: https://youtu.be/fYv7V_d03cA

Remember that my videos are not a substitute for individualized medical care by a qualified physician. Always consult your physicians before making any diet, nutrition, medication, or lifestyle changes.

I enjoy providing educational videos to all of you, but I want to ensure that you are aware that only the official accounts authorized to promote and share my content are Dr. Pradip Jamnadas, MD, Aristotle Education, LLC, The Galen Foundation, and Cardiovascular Interventions.  @pradipjamnadasmd   and  @thegalenfoundation

videos.title: The L.A.B Putter I've Been Waiting For!
videos.summary_source_text:
The L.A.B Putter I've Been Waiting For! Rick has been openly skeptical about L.A.B. Golf— but the Link is different. For the first time, L.A.B. have brought their zero-torque engineering to a traditional blade shape. No mallets, no gimmicks. Just a classic-looking Anser-style putter that's been precision-engineered to stay square through the stroke.
So does it finally make a believer out of Rick? He takes it to the zen putting green to find out — and gives his most honest verdict yet on whether L.A.B. Golf lives up to the hype.

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: Stop Trying to Score From the Blue Line. Do This Instead
videos.summary_source_text:
Stop Trying to Score From the Blue Line. Do This Instead Stop Trying to Score From the Blue Line. Do This Instead.

Here's the truth about blue line shooting: you don't need to always rip a big slapshot. You don't need to aim it top corner. You need to get it on net through traffic, on the ice or just above it. That's the real goal from the point is to find the shooting lane.

In this video I break down what's actually different about shooting from the blue line versus in close, and it's probably not what you think.

What's covered:
→ The Slingshot Shooting System: how modern composite sticks changed shooting mechanics forever.
→ Why less effort + more stick flex = better shots than just "whacking the puck".
→ The key difference between blue line shots and in-close shots (it's about aim, not power).
→ Lateral movement footwork patterns that get pucks through traffic: backwards corkscrew, ten-and-two, soft drag.
→ The head pattern: eyes to puck, scan the net, eyes back to puck, release.
→ Why moving laterally is the #1 key to getting shots through from the point.

The skating patterns and the head mechanics are what separate defensemen who get shots through from those who don't. Power is secondary.

0:00 — Blue line shots vs. in-close shots
0:25 — The Slingshot Shooting System explained
0:50 — How modern sticks changed shooting mechanics
1:15 — The main difference: aim lower, get it on net
1:45 — Lateral movement patterns to get through traffic
2:20 — The head pattern: puck, net, puck, release
3:00 — Where to learn the full mechanics

videos.title: Mitt nya bilköp - på verkstad två gånger på väg hem från Tyskland!
videos.summary_source_text:
Mitt nya bilköp - på verkstad två gånger på väg hem från Tyskland! Att importera en drömbil kan se enkelt ut på pappret, men verkligheten på Autobahn är ofta en annan. Efter 40 år som motorjournalist borde jag ha förutsett strulet, men passionen för den sällsynta saffransgula Volvo C70:n tog överhanden. Följ med på en resa som börjar med ett lyckat köp i Berlin men som snabbt eskalerar till missljud, akuta verkstadsbesök hos "Auto Herbst" och en nervös väntan på reservdelar. Det här är den osminkade sanningen om bilimport: från den glödande lacken i vårsolen till den bittra fakturan och kampen för att ens ta sig över Öresundsbron.

Bli gärna medlem och stöd kanalen, som blir reklamfri! 29 kr/månad
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCU-4UJDGqQWK5Iv4wXDlzGQ/join

⚡️ Köp eller sälj elbil via Carla: https://carla.se
📉 Kolla vad din bil är värd hos Bilpriser: https://bilpriser.se
🔌 Smartare laddlösningar från Phasebox: https://phasebox.se
Haveri på vägen?
Som ni såg i filmen kan vad som helst hända med en 26 år gammal bil. Se till att ha ordning på grejerna du också:
https://www.mekonomen.se

00:00:00 – Inledningen: Den bittra insikten på verkstaden – vad är det som låter? []
00:00:23 – Mötet med René: Köpet genomförs och vi tar adjö av den tidigare ägaren i Berlin. []
00:01:03 – Katastrofen börjar: Första stoppet på Autobahn. Missljudet som inte går att ignorera. []
00:01:30 – Diagnosen: Vi hittar felet – ett hjullager som gett upp helt efter bara några mil. []
00:02:32 – Verkstadsjakt: Panik i Berlin – ringer runt till tyska Volvo-verkstäder på knagglig tyska. []
00:04:12 – Auto Herbst: Bilen rullar in på lyften. En första titt på undersidan av importen. []
00:06:49 – Berlin-paus: En ofrivillig sightseeing i väntan på delar. Checkpoint Charlie och muren. []
00:09:16 – Samtalet: En reflektion över pris, skick och varför man köper en 25 år gammal Volvo. []
01:11:52 – Reparationen: Delarna har kommit! Hjullagerbyte och en faktura på 485 Euro. []
01:17:40 – Frihet: Vi lämnar Berlin och trycker gasen i botten mot färjan i Puttgarden. []
01:22:06 – Varningen: Historien om norrmannen som förlorade sin Lamborghini – vi håller hastigheten. []
01:25:52 – Öresundsbron: Den vackra men nervösa sista etappen hem mot Sverige. []
01:26:40 – Hemma: En sammanfattning av resan och vad som väntar härnäst för C70:n. []

#volvo #c70 #volvoc70 #phasebox #carla #mekonomen #bilimport #import #bromsproblem Att importera en drömbil kan se enkelt ut på pappret, men verkligheten på Autobahn är ofta en annan. Efter 40 år som motorjournalist borde jag ha förutsett strulet, men passionen för den sällsynta saffransgula Volvo C70:n tog överhanden. Följ med på en resa som börjar med ett lyckat köp i Berlin men som snabbt eskalerar till missljud, akuta verkstadsbesök hos "Auto Herbst" och en nervös väntan på reservdelar. Det här är den osminkade sanningen om bilimport: från den glödande lacken i vårsolen till den bittra fakturan och kampen för att ens ta sig över Öresundsbron.

Bli gärna medlem och stöd kanalen, som blir reklamfri! 29 kr/månad
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCU-4UJDGqQWK5Iv4wXDlzGQ/join

⚡️ Köp eller sälj elbil via Carla: https://carla.se
📉 Kolla vad din bil är värd hos Bilpriser: https://bilpriser.se
🔌 Smartare laddlösningar från Phasebox: https://phasebox.se
Haveri på vägen?
Som ni såg i filmen kan vad som helst hända med en 26 år gammal bil. Se till att ha ordning på grejerna du också:
https://www.mekonomen.se

00:00:00 – Inledningen: Den bittra insikten på verkstaden – vad är det som låter? []
00:00:23 – Mötet med René: Köpet genomförs och vi tar adjö av den tidigare ägaren i Berlin. []
00:01:03 – Katastrofen börjar: Första stoppet på Autobahn. Missljudet som inte går att ignorera. []
00:01:30 – Diagnosen: Vi hittar felet – ett hjullager som gett upp helt efter bara några mil. []
00:02:32 – Verkstadsjakt: Panik i Berlin – ringer runt till tyska Volvo-verkstäder på knagglig tyska. []
00:04:12 – Auto Herbst: Bilen rullar in på lyften. En första titt på undersidan av importen. []
00:06:49 – Berlin-paus: En ofrivillig sightseeing i väntan på delar. Checkpoint Charlie och muren. []
00:09:16 – Samtalet: En reflektion över pris, skick och varför man köper en 25 år gammal Volvo. []
01:11:52 – Reparationen: Delarna har kommit! Hjullagerbyte och en faktura på 485 Euro. []
01:17:40 – Frihet: Vi lämnar Berlin och trycker gasen i botten mot färjan i Puttgarden. []
01:22:06 – Varningen: Historien om norrmannen som förlorade sin Lamborghini – vi håller hastigheten. []
01:25:52 – Öresundsbron: Den vackra men nervösa sista etappen hem mot Sverige. []
01:26:40 – Hemma: En sammanfattning av resan och vad som väntar härnäst för C70:n. []

videos.title: How to Lose Stubborn Belly Fat Much Faster (NO, SERIOUSLY!)
videos.summary_source_text:
How to Lose Stubborn Belly Fat Much Faster (NO, SERIOUSLY!) If you’re trying to lose stubborn belly fat but nothing seems to work, then this is a video you can’t afford to skip. In this video, I’m going to walk you through 4 brutally honest questions that most people avoid answering—but until you do, that fat around your waist isn’t going anywhere. Answer them truthfully, and you’ll finally unlock what’s been holding you back from getting lean.

FREE TOTAL BODY WORKOUT HERE - https://athleanx.com/tbfree
SUBSCRIBE TO THIS CHANNEL HERE - https://bit.ly/2b0coMW

Here’s the reality. Losing fat is both incredibly simple and frustratingly difficult at the same time. The science behind fat loss is clear and has been for decades. The problem isn’t knowing what to do—it’s consistently doing it well enough for long enough to see results. And that’s where most people fall apart.

So before you start blaming genetics or calling your belly fat “stubborn,” you need to take a hard look in the mirror. Not to judge how you look—but to honestly evaluate what you’ve been doing.

The first question you have to ask yourself is this: is your belly fat actually stubborn…or is your overall body fat still just too high? Because those are two completely different situations. If you’re still carrying a higher body fat percentage overall, then the issue isn’t stubborn fat—it’s inconsistency. Tightening up your habits will get you moving in the right direction fast.

But if you truly feel like you’re doing everything right and still can’t get rid of that last layer, then we have to dig deeper. That’s where these next questions come in.

Let’s start with alcohol. I get it—this isn’t just about drinking for the sake of it. It’s social. It’s part of how people relax and connect. But you can’t ignore what it does. Liquid calories add up quickly, and alcohol directly interferes with your body’s ability to burn fat efficiently. That doesn’t mean you can never drink—but it does mean you need to decide what matters more to you. Getting lean…or maintaining that habit. There’s no right answer—but there is an honest one.

Next comes nutrition. And this is where most people think they’re doing better than they actually are. Fat loss requires a calorie deficit. There’s no way around that. But how you create that deficit matters. Extreme diets, cutting out entire food groups, or trying to crash your way lean almost always backfire.

If you believe you’re in a deficit and still not losing belly fat, then you need to break this down further. First—how clean is your diet, really? Not what you think it is, but what it actually is. If that checks out, then look at your portions. Because even clean food in the wrong amounts will stall progress. And if that still isn’t the issue, then you’re left with one final truth—your consistency isn’t where it needs to be. This is where cheat meals quietly turn into cheat days…or worse.

From there, we have to look at your training. Because diet alone will never be enough if your goal is to get lean and stay lean. You need to train—and not just with endless cardio. You need resistance training to build muscle. Muscle is what drives your metabolism higher and allows your body to burn more calories even at rest.

A solid plan should include weight training at least 3 to 5 times per week, with an emphasis on intensity and total workload. Adding in things like barbell complexes can help you increase calorie burn while still building athletic, functional muscle.

And finally, we come to ab training. Not because it’s going to magically burn belly fat—it won’t. But because developing your abs creates a visual payoff that reinforces everything else you’re doing. When you start to see those muscles come in, it builds momentum. And momentum is what keeps you consistent.

At the end of the day, getting rid of belly fat isn’t about secrets or shortcuts. It’s about honesty. Brutal honesty. Once you identify where you’re falling short, you can fix it—and when you fix it, the results follow.

If you’re looking for a step-by-step program that takes all of this guesswork out and shows you exactly how to train and eat to lose belly fat, build lean muscle, and get in your best shape ever, head to athleanx.com and find the program that matches your goals.

And if you want more videos that break down fat loss, ab training, and performance the right way—make sure you subscribe to the channel, turn on notifications, and never miss a new video when it drops. Fix Your Swing FAST (Simple Trail Side Drill) #shorts #golf #golfer #golfswing #ericcogorno #shorts 

How to stay down in your golf swing — stop standing up at impact with this simple trail side drill. Fix your ball striking for good.

👉 Start Here: https://ericcogornogolf.podia.com 

🛒 RECOMMENDED GOLF EQUIPMENT & TRAINING AIDS:
• Takomo Golf - https://takomogolf.com
• Precision Impact Right Wrist Trainer - https://pureswingproducts.com/?sca_ref=1815522.bXQUsGp2bS (Code: COGORNO for $20 OFF)
• theHanger Training Aid - https://www.hangergolf.com/?sca_ref=944104.HqM9GYcX2I (Code: COGORNO for 15% OFF)

In This Video, You'll Discover:
• How to stay down in your golf swing the right way — using trail side down instead of chest down to finally achieve consistent, solid contact 
• Why keeping your chest down through the ball is the mistake most high handicap golfersmake — and what the best ball strikers do instead 
• The "Chest Out, Trail Side Down, Hips Forward" mantra that transforms your impact position with any club 
• A simple rib cage drill any golfer can do at home to feel the correct trail side movement in seconds 
• How getting your trail side down automatically pushes your lead hip into the correct position — no extra thought required 
• Golf swing tips used by PGA Tour players to maintain their spine angle from setup all the way through the follow through 
• How to use the Swing Coach app to identify if you're standing up early — and stop it for good

Most golfers who struggle with ball striking have one thing in common: they're trying to stay down by keeping their chest toward the ground, which actually causes early extension and inconsistent contact. Eric Cogorno breaks down the real key — rotating your chest out toward the target while your trail shoulder, pec, and rib cage drive down through the ball. This golf swing analysis of PGA Tour players shows exactly what separates consistent ball strikers from the rest. Whether you're working with a golf swing coach or self-coaching with golf drills at home, mastering this trail side movement is one of the highest-leverage changes any amateur can make.

Most golfers ruin their swing in the first 18 inches of the takeaway — and don’t even realize it. In this lesson, Coach Ed Schwent breaks down how a proper takeaway can fix multiple swing flaws instantly, from slices to hooks to inconsistent contact. If you’ve been struggling with your swing, this is one of the most important fundamentals to master.

You’ll learn why setup (especially shoulder alignment) directly affects your takeaway, how to move the clubhead and handle together, and why most golfers get too “handsy” early in the swing. Ed also explains the correct sequence — turn first, then hinge — along with simple drills like the one-hand takeaway drill, the “bucket of water” feel, and the flashlight drill to keep the club on plane.

Finally, you’ll discover how tempo plays a critical role — not too fast, not too slow — and how a more athletic, dynamic start can improve both your consistency and clubhead speed. Fix your takeaway, and you’ll fix your golf swing at the source.

videos.title: Anti Shank Drill   #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Anti Shank Drill   #golfswing #golftips This range drill is perfect if you struggle with early extension or keep finding the hosel with your irons. By setting up with the ball off the heel and swinging to miss it on the inside, you learn how to keep the club working on a better path. Then, using the same setup, striking the ball off the toe trains you to return the club to the center of the face. This helps you find the sweet spot again and produces much cleaner contact.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. This range drill is perfect if you struggle with early extension or keep finding the hosel with your irons. By setting up with the ball off the heel and swinging to miss it on the inside, you learn how to keep the club working on a better path. Then, using the same setup, striking the ball off the toe trains you to return the club to the center of the face. This helps you find the sweet spot again and produces much cleaner contact.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf.

videos.title: How To Play A Par 3 Smarter #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Play A Par 3 Smarter #golfswing #golftips A lot of par-3 shots come up short before the swing even starts. When you tee the ball too high, you lose ball speed and don’t let the loft of the club do the work. Add in aiming straight at tucked pins and choosing clubs based on your best strike, and you’re setting yourself up for failure. In this video we show how better tee height, smarter targets, and realistic club choice lead to more greens hit.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. A lot of par-3 shots come up short before the swing even starts. When you tee the ball too high, you lose ball speed and don’t let the loft of the club do the work. Add in aiming straight at tucked pins and choosing clubs based on your best strike, and you’re setting yourself up for failure. In this video we show how better tee height, smarter targets, and realistic club choice lead to more greens hit.

videos.title: What Happens When You Stop Eating After 6PM
videos.summary_source_text:
What Happens When You Stop Eating After 6PM What happens when you stop eating after 6 p.m.? Discover the connection between your metabolism and fasting so you understand when to eat and when not to eat, plus the benefits of having no food after 6 p.m.

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

0:00 Introduction: What happens when you stop eating after 6 p.m.? 
0:15 What to eat vs. when to eat
0:50 Autophagy fasting benefits
1:28 Late-night eating dangers
3:01 Dopamine and late-night snacking
4:03 How to stop eating after 6 p.m. 

Keep watching for more on the benefits of fasting and other ways to stay healthy:
▶️ https://youtu.be/O1zKV3eqevc
▶️ https://youtu.be/4wcpfCV-B1I
▶️ https://youtu.be/_CqXHYgKKtY

Download Dr. Berg's Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/48XJoCf

Eating after 6 p.m. can interfere with your body’s natural repair system. Even if you’re eating clean, nutrient-dense foods, late-night eating may still negatively impact your metabolism, recovery, and overall health.

At night, your body is designed to enter autophagy, a deep cellular “clean-up” process where damaged cells and mitochondria are repaired and recycled. Autophagy only occurs when insulin levels are low. Every time you eat, insulin rises, which can interrupt this critical overnight repair cycle. This is why fasting after 6 p.m. is critical for optimal metabolic and cellular health.

Late-night eating can also disrupt melatonin production, affecting sleep quality and recovery. Poor sleep then impacts digestion, increases stress hormones like cortisol, and can lead to unstable blood sugar levels the following day.

Another major driver of late-night snacking is dopamine hunger. This is when cravings are triggered not by true physical hunger, but by boredom, stress, fatigue, or emotional habits, leading to unnecessary eating when the body should be resting and repairing.

videos.title: How To CLEAN Your LIVER in 3 Days!
videos.summary_source_text:
How To CLEAN Your LIVER in 3 Days! This natural liver cleanse is one of the most powerful methods I’ve ever shared. Discover how to detox your liver in just 3 days, along with expert liver health tips to support lasting results.

0:00 Introduction: Natural liver detox
0:10 Liver cleanses and detoxes 
0:35 Liver detoxification
1:52 How to trigger autophagy
2:40 The best “liver cleanse”
3:14 Dry fasting benefits 
5:00 Liver cleansing foods
6:30 Prevent negative liver detox reaction
8:05 Learn more about liver detoxification

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Learn more about TUDCA here:
▶️ https://youtu.be/boTzigj646Q 

Keep watching to understand the real underlying causes of gallbladder and liver problems:
▶️ https://youtu.be/F84ijY7Iofg

Today, I’m going to show you how to cleanse your liver in just three days. 

I’ve tested many different liver cleanses, and most have left me sick in bed. But what I’m going to share today is different. 

This natural liver cleanse is also different from the liver detoxes and liver cleanses I’ve mentioned in the past, like apple cider vinegar, lemon, or ginger—it’s even better. 

To support and speed up liver detoxification, we need to trigger autophagy. 

The best ways to trigger autophagy:
1. Dry fasting
2. Water fasting
3. Calorie restriction
4. Sleep
5. Exercise
6. Keto diet 
7. Phytonutrients 

Dry fasting is one of the most powerful ways to trigger autophagy and truly cleanse the liver cells. 

With dry fasting, you don’t consume any food or water. To cleanse the liver, you may want to consider dry fasting for a full day—starting at sunrise and ending at sunset.

The effects of just one day of dry fasting are equivalent to three days of water fasting. 

Additional benefits of dry fasting:
 • Enhanced immunity
 • Liver and kidney support 
 • Mental clarity
 • Decreased inflammation 

When the sun sets, you’ll eat your one meal for the day, which should consist of meat and cruciferous vegetables. These foods are also great for cleaning the liver. 

Try dry fasting for three days of the month (they don't need to be consecutive) and see how you feel.

Before you start dry fasting, take bile salts or TUDCA, consume beets, or drink apple cider vinegar with water to help thin your bile. This can help prevent any negative liver detox side effects.

videos.title: Bättre bollträff och mer kraft med en cirkel till bollen…
videos.channel: Bättre & Enklare golf med Marcus Edblad PGA
videos.summary_source_text:
Bättre bollträff och mer kraft med en cirkel till bollen… En baksving som känns mer uppåt behöver inte ge en brant sving till bollen. Lär dig den magiska cirkeln tillbaka till bollen och du får direkt mer kraft och kontroll i slagen. #golftips #golfswing #golf 

Nu finns det möjlighet att genom appen Skillest göra mig till din personliga tränare. Du hittar mig på denna länk: https://skillest.com/app/profile/marcus-edblad

Låt mig hjälpa dig finna bättre slag, bollträff, riktning och svinghastighet. Oavsett om du slår en wedge, järnklubba eller driver kan du med dina händer lära dig golfslag som du inte trodde var möjliga. Längre och rakare slag kräver alltid träning men något alla kan lära sig.  

Vare sig du fightas med en slice eller en hook så har jag videos som kan guida till bättre golf. Är du nybörjare så kan du börja med min grönt kort eller nybörjarkurs.

Försök ersätta dåliga vanor med nya bättre vanor. Oavsett vilket loft eller skaft din klubba har så är det du som bestämmer vad som ska hända. Oavsett om det står callaway, ping, titleist eller taylor made på klubban så kan du slå bra slag.

Var noga med vad du tittar på. Det finns många duktiga instruktörer på nätet, några av mina favoriter är Mike Malaska, Mike Dunaway, Mike Austin.

Försök fokusera på grunderna i slaget bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår. Träna med fördel på en sak i taget. Tränar du din svinghastighet måste du tillåta att det går snett och tränar du raka slag kan du inte samtidigt svinga i max fart.

Ha tålamod och låt det ta sin tid, luras inte av genvägar som bara gör att du tappar fokus från det viktiga. Golf kommer alltid vara svårt men vi kan med träning se till att vi blir bättre för varje dag som går.

Titta mycket på golf på TV. Bryson Dechambeu, Dustin Johnson, Rory Mcilroy kan inspirera till längre slag och andra som Tiger Woods, Viktor Hovland, Ludvig Åberg och Phil Mickelson kan ge dig fantasi att skapa nya slag.

Träna styrketräning för hela kroppen för att må bra genom livet och skapa en effektiv maskin. Träna händer, handleder och armar för att skapa en effektiv release och mer svinghastighet.

Du kan finna inspiration i filmer som Happy Gilmore, Tin Cup eller Bagger Vance. Filmer som Rocky kan ge dig motivation att ta dig till gymet. Legender som Arnold Schwarzenegger, Sylvester Stallone eller Hulk Hogan kan få dig att vilja bli starkare och Moe Norman, Arnold Palmer, Ben Hogan, Sam Snead eller Jack Nicklaus kan inspirera dig att bli en bättre golfare. 

Ge aldrig upp i sökandet och träningen för att få bästa bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår.

Filmat med iPhone 17 och redigerat i iMovie på en Macbook. En baksving som känns mer uppåt behöver inte ge en brant sving till bollen. Lär dig den magiska cirkeln tillbaka till bollen och du får direkt mer kraft och kontroll i slagen. #golftips #golfswing #golf

videos.title: More power, speed and control with a shallow attack…
videos.channel: Better & Easier golf with your guide Marcus Edblad
videos.summary_source_text:
More power, speed and control with a shallow attack… Going up instead of around in your back swing gives you a chance to swing back down to the ball in a powerful circular motion. This video explains how. #golftips #golfswing #golfgear 

0:00 Intro to better power and control with a shallow attack

Online lesson are now a possibility on Skillest: https://skillest.com/app/profile/marcus-edblad

Let me help you get an effortless golfswing with speed, distance and accuracy. I call it the circle of speed. A good release will help you to a better impact and longer drives and irons without slice and hook. How to swing a golf club need to be adjusted to your skill level and experience. 

Long and straight is the goal for everyone but it takes time. Try to focus on one thing not everything when you practise. Impact, face control and swingpath will always be the most important part to drill. We focus too much on rotation but no good golf shot will be executed just by rotating. 

We also need to understand that many myths in golf are misleading. Everything that you find on the internet isn’t true. Ben Hogan, Sam Snead are two of the legends that are often misunderstood.  To understand golf we need to take it step by step and learn every part of the swing before we move on to the next. It's like a big jigsaw puzzle that we all can figure out. 

A will never call a slice sexy but a high draw is beautiful in a very special way. Some pro's that hit draw: Rory McIroy, Xander Schauffele, Patrick Reed, Sepp Straka, Bryson Dechambeau  and many, many more. 

We shall not keep our head still, only start with the hips, look only at the ball or keep the left or right arm straight. Understand what do do with the club and let your body find the best way possible. 

This is not Rick Shiels, Saguto golf, Danny Maude, Meandmygolf, the Average Golfer, Malaska, Mark Crossfield, Alex Elliot Golf or Paige Spiranac. This is a method that anyone can learn if you give it a chance. 

If you use callaway, ping, titleist, takomo or taylor made clubs doesn’t matter you can learn to hit good golf shots. Your loft or your shaft on the club will not change but you can always get better. 

Find what inspires you. Golf basics are the same for everyone. The pga tour, longdrivers or other good golfers can all help you find better golf shots. Watch what they do instead of listed to what they say. Listen mostly to your body and figure out what you need to do to produce the same results as the pros on TV. Be careful when you watch a golf swing in slow motion. The result isn't always what the golfer is trying to do. Feel and real are seldom the same. 

We can find inspiration in a lot of things. You can find training motivation watching movies like Rocky, Tin Cup or Happy Gilmore and find mental inspiration in legends like Arnold Schwarzenegger, Hulk Hogan, Sylvester Stallone or Mike Tyson. Maybe we sometimes need to hear about crazy achievements from people like David Goggins, Jocko Willink, Ct Fletcher, Jim Rohn or Tony Robbins. 

Mike Malaska, Mike Austin, Mike Dunaway, Pete Cowen and Steve Pratt are some of my favorite golf instructors online. Find the tips that make your golf better. Decide what you want to hit. I teach a draw but many like a fade and nobody likes a hook or slice. 

Your hips or your lag is not the key to golf. Your hands will decide the shot and you can do like Tiger Woods and trust your hands. Teach your hands to hit different shots. Hit big hooks and slices to understand what happens. Only straight is not gonna teach you anything. 

Bryson Dechambeu and Kyle Birkshire can inspire you to hit it longer. Tiger Woods and Phil Mickelson can give you inspiration and motivation to test new things and new golf shots. Linn Grant, Viktor Hovland and Ludvig Aberg can show you the future of golf. 

The Masters, Players Championship, The Players, The Open and US Open can make you love golf even more. See the best in the world solve all the problems we all need to master any golf course. Golf is a craft and you need fantasy, feel and skills to master it.

Questions my videos will answer:

How to swing faster. How to hit longer. How to swing faster. How to hit your irons better. How to be better at anything. How to master the circle of speed. How to get a better short game. How to hit your wedge better. How to release the golf club. How to rotate in golf. Best tips for beginner golfers. How to hit down on the ball. How to hit up on the ball. How to rotate hips in the golf swing. How to hit straight every time. How to stop slicing. How to swing effortlessly. 

#subscribe #golftips #pga  #hurricane

To understand golf we need to take it step by step and learn every part of the swing before we move on to the next. It's like a big jigsaw puzzle that we all can figure out.

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 3 | RBC Heritage | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 3 | RBC Heritage | 2026 Check out all the best shots from Round 3 at the 2026 RBC Heritage, featuring Scottie Scheffler, Matt Fitzpatrick, Patrick Cantlay and Gary Woodland, among others.

Fresh off The Masters, where Rory McIlroy went back-to-back to join an elite group of repeat champions, the PGA TOUR heads to the Lowcountry for the RBC Heritage at Harbour Town Golf Links. This Signature Event features a no-cut field and a loaded lineup, highlighted by defending champion Justin Thomas, who returns after his dramatic playoff win in 2025. World No. 1 Scottie Scheffler arrives off a runner-up finish at Augusta and looks to add another Harbour Town title, while Cameron Young brings serious momentum after a T3 at the Masters and a win at THE PLAYERS Championship. Keep an eye on Matt Fitzpatrick, already a winner this spring, and Jordan Spieth, a past champion with a strong track record at Harbour Town. Meanwhile, Collin Morikawa returns after a solid showing at Augusta, and Xander Schauffele continues a run of consistent form. Don’t overlook FedExCup contender Jacob Bridgeman, who’s been one of the breakout performers of the season, or Max Homa, who had another strong major showing. With a stacked field, no cut, and one of the TOUR’s most iconic layouts, Harbour Town sets the stage for another high-level week on the PGA TOUR.

videos.title: OpenAI’s New ROSALIND Is Now Performing At Human Level
videos.summary_source_text:
OpenAI’s New ROSALIND Is Now Performing At Human Level OpenAI just launched GPT-Rosalind, a new AI model built specifically for life sciences, drug discovery, and serious biological research, and this feels like a much bigger move than a normal model release. It can read papers, connect scientific tools, generate hypotheses, plan experiments, and handle complex research workflows across biology and medicine. Though that was only part of the story, because OpenAI also launched GPT-5.4-Cyber for vetted defenders, upgraded its Agents SDK for more capable secure agents, and then the week took a darker turn after the shocking attack case tied to Sam Altman and OpenAI.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com
🚀 New Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@science.revolution

🧠 What You’ll See
GPT-Rosalind launch, life sciences focus, trusted access rollout, and the new Codex plugin with 50 plus scientific tools
SOURCE: https://openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-rosalind/
GPT-5.4-Cyber, Trusted Access for Cyber, binary analysis, and OpenAI’s wider push into defensive security
SOURCE: https://openai.com/index/scaling-trusted-access-for-cyber-defense/
Agents SDK upgrades including configurable memory, sandbox-aware orchestration, and stronger file and tool workflows
SOURCE: https://openai.com/index/the-next-evolution-of-the-agents-sdk/
The Sam Altman attack case, attempted murder charges, and the escalating public tension around AI
SOURCE: https://apnews.com/article/b10d8ae447dbddb1a1a6e72bec13a02d

🚨 Why It Matters
This goes way beyond one model launch. Rosalind shows OpenAI pushing AI into high-stakes scientific discovery, GPT-5.4-Cyber expands how far trusted defenders can go with frontier models, and the Agents SDK update makes it easier to build systems that actually do real work. Then the Altman attack shows how heated the broader AI climate is becoming, turning this from a product story into a much bigger conversation about power, safety, and where all of this is heading.

GPT-5.4-Cyber, Trusted Access for Cyber, binary analysis, and OpenAI’s wider push into defensive security
SOURCE: https://openai.com/index/scaling-trusted-access-for-cyber-defense/
Agents SDK upgrades including configurable memory, sandbox-aware orchestration, and stronger file and tool workflows
SOURCE: https://openai.com/index/the-next-evolution-of-the-agents-sdk/
The Sam Altman attack case, attempted murder charges, and the escalating public tension around AI
SOURCE: https://apnews.com/article/b10d8ae447dbddb1a1a6e72bec13a02d

🚨 Why It Matters
This goes way beyond one model launch. Rosalind shows OpenAI pushing AI into high-stakes scientific discovery, GPT-5.4-Cyber expands how far trusted defenders can go with frontier models, and the Agents SDK update makes it easier to build systems that actually do real work. Then the Altman attack shows how heated the broader AI climate is becoming, turning this from a product story into a much bigger conversation about power, safety, and where all of this is heading.

#openai #ai #rosalind

videos.title: Focus On The Hole, Not The Putter  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Focus On The Hole, Not The Putter  #golfswing #golftips Most golfers focus all their attention on the putter and forget about the actual putt they’re trying to play. By lining up and looking at the hole, you become more aware of the target and the distance required. This shift in focus allows the stroke to feel freer and more natural. Better awareness of the putt often leads to better distance control.

videos.title: The Forgotten Tee Height Trick a Golf Legend Taught Me…I Ignored It for 2 Years
videos.summary_source_text:
The Forgotten Tee Height Trick a Golf Legend Taught Me…I Ignored It for 2 Years In this video, I’m sharing a forgotten tee height trick I originally learned from a golfing legend and I’ve been using it for the past 2 years.

This video was filmed at https://www.visitredsea.com/en/shura-...
Book here -  www.shuralinks.com

Book an online lesson with me - https://skillest.com/@AlexElliott

This mind blowing concept is so simple it almost feels unbelievable but it helped me gain 10 extra yards off the tee and you will start using it immediately. I did.

This is your chance to get inside the mind of a true golfing great and understand one of the small details that can make a massive difference to your game.

Inspired by insights from Costantino Rocca this video breaks down a key concept that applies not just off the tee but across your entire game.

We cover
The forgotten tee height concept most golfers ignore
Why it works and how it can add distance and consistency
How I have used it for 2 years to gain more yards off the tee
How you can apply it instantly to your own game

If you are looking to add more distance off the tee improve consistency and strike the ball better this is something you need to try.

When you apply the right strategy across the tee the fairway approach shots and the greens that is when your scores really start to fall.

videos.title: Prediction Time: George and Jess Break Down the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Playoffs
videos.summary_source_text:
Prediction Time: George and Jess Break Down the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Playoffs Florida Panthers television reporter Jessica Blaylock and FHN Publisher George Richards break down the 2026 Stanley Cup playoffs from the IcePlex in Fort Lauderdale on April 16, 2026. 

The Panthers won three straight to end the season but will end the season out of the Stanley Cup Playoffs. 

Late Thursday night, they did clinch the No. 8 spot in the pre-lottery draft standings and will have a 2026 first-round pick if they want it. 

Florida won the past two Stanley Cup championships. 

The two-time Stanley Cup champions will miss the playoffs for the first time since 2019.
