videos.title: To Hit Driver Longer & Straighter Simply Do This Before Every Swing
videos.summary_source_text:
To Hit Driver Longer & Straighter Simply Do This Before Every Swing Want to hit driver longer but keep losing control every time you go for it? You're caught in the same cycle as almost every golfer — chase distance and the ball goes everywhere, back off for control and the distance disappears. This golf driver lesson shows you how to finally have both.

Most golf driver tips focus on either distance or accuracy. This one addresses both at the same time — because the real secret to hitting driver longer and straighter isn't about swinging harder or slowing down. It's about understanding two simple things: how to load the club at the top of your golf swing, and how to time the release on the way down. Get both right and distance and control stop being a trade-off. They start happening together.

In this driver lesson I use a saw — yes, a saw — to show you exactly what your hands and wrists should be doing throughout your golf swing. It sounds unusual but I promise once you feel it, the club head speed you've been leaving behind starts to come back immediately. And the control comes with it. If you want to add distance to your driver swing and still hit driver straight, I really think this simple golf tip could help.

Here's Your Free Practice plan for this video too: https://www.dannymaude.com/hit-driver-longer-do-this-before-every-swing: 

Here's also a discount should you want to purchase a Hackmotion device: https://hackmotion.com/affiliates/dannymaude/?aff=192&utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=affiliate&utm_campaign=dm&utm_content=pp&utm_term=18_04_2029you

Plus get access to the driver course 

What you'll learn in this golf driver lesson:

▶ Why you keep trading distance for control — and how to stop the cycle
▶ The saw drill that shows you exactly what your hands should do in your golf swing
▶ How to load the club at the top to generate effortless driver distance
▶ The release timing secret that helps you hit driver longer and straighter
▶ Why most golfers release too early and how to fix it immediately
▶ How to generate more club head speed without swinging out of control
▶ Why this drill works for every club in the bag not just your driver

⏱️ CHAPTERS

0:00 — The distance vs control cycle every golfer knows
0:45 — Why club head speed without control costs you distance
1:49 — The saw drill — feel your golf swing like never before
2:40 — How trail elbow position loads the club at the top
3:53 — Hitting driver with one hand — the proof it works
5:26 — How the saw drill shows you the correct release path
6:35 — Release timing — why most golfers are too early
7:35 — Using HackMotion for release timing feedback
8:44 — The saw drill in action with driver
10:26 — Free driver course — how to access it

This golf driver lesson works for all levels — whether you're a beginner trying to understand how to hit driver consistently for the first time, a mid-handicapper frustrated with a slice that costs you distance off the tee, or someone who hits it reasonably straight but wants to add serious yards without losing control. If you've been choosing between hitting driver longer and hitting driver straighter, this simple golf swing drill changes that trade-off completely. One drill, two results.

If this helped your driver swing, hit the like button and subscribe — I release a new golf lesson every single week to help you hit it further and straighter.

videos.title: STOP Doing THIS If You Want to Build Muscle
videos.summary_source_text:
STOP Doing THIS If You Want to Build Muscle This could be why you’re not gaining muscle, even if you’re putting in serious effort. Discover the #1 muscle growth mistake and learn how to build muscle correctly with proven muscle growth tips.

0:00 Introduction: Muscle-building mistakes 
0:53 The biggest muscle-building mistake
2:18 Hypertrophy training tips
5:23 Muscle recovery and strength training tips 
6:36 Prioritize rest to build muscle faster 
8:17 Muscle growth mistakes with your diet
9:50 More muscle-building mistakes
11:56 Muscle growth tips for diet

Ron William's YouTube Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@RonWilliamsChampion 

Watch these next to improve muscle growth, core strength, and training results: 
▶️ https://youtu.be/FAuClbdfqrI
▶️ https://youtu.be/XPDzypsisI4
▶️ https://youtu.be/e8gl002hqik

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

👉 Get Dr. Berg’s Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/4es6PqP

One of the most common reasons you’re not gaining muscle is that you’re not training hard enough. Most people never reach the intensity required for real muscle growth, making this one of the biggest workout mistakes killing your gains. 

To build muscle effectively, you need to train with enough intensity to reach the proper threshold for muscle growth. This is known as proximity to failure. How close you get to failure during your sets determines if you’re using the right weight and truly stimulating muscle growth.

Avoiding overtraining is just as important. Muscle growth doesn’t happen during the workout; it happens during recovery. Giving your muscles, tendons, and fascia time to repair is essential if you want to build muscle faster while keeping cortisol levels under control.

To maximize muscle growth, prioritize quality sleep, manage stress, and support recovery with a healthy diet. Low-intensity activities like walking can also help regulate cortisol and improve recovery, allowing your body to rebuild stronger and optimize results from your workouts.

Dr. Eric Berg DC Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 61, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals and author of the best-selling book The Healthy Keto Plan. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

One of the most common reasons you’re not gaining muscle is that you’re not training hard enough. Most people never reach the intensity required for real muscle growth, making this one of the biggest workout mistakes killing your gains. 

To build muscle effectively, you need to train with enough intensity to reach the proper threshold for muscle growth. This is known as proximity to failure. How close you get to failure during your sets determines if you’re using the right weight and truly stimulating muscle growth.

Avoiding overtraining is just as important. Muscle growth doesn’t happen during the workout; it happens during recovery. Giving your muscles, tendons, and fascia time to repair is essential if you want to build muscle faster while keeping cortisol levels under control.

To maximize muscle growth, prioritize quality sleep, manage stress, and support recovery with a healthy diet. Low-intensity activities like walking can also help regulate cortisol and improve recovery, allowing your body to rebuild stronger and optimize results from your workouts.

I Might Get Banned for This... I might get banned for this! This will make you question everything you thought you knew about vitamin D and modern medicine. 

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

THE MIRACULOUS CURE FOR AND PREVENTION OF ALL DISEASES BOOK LINK:
https://www.amazon.com/Miraculous-Prevention-Diseases-Doctors-Learned/dp/1701336502 

Dr. Bruce Hollis Interview: 
▶️ https://youtu.be/QAQ7r6jLEww

DATA: 
https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/31002167/  

0:00 Introduction: Vitamin D dosage
1:45 Vitamin D toxicity
3:02 Dr. Bruce Hollis and vitamin D research
4:16 The history of vitamin D in modern medicine 
6:11 Barriers to vitamin D absorption

Today, I’m going to tell you the truth about vitamin D. The current RDA for vitamin D is 600 IU (international units), which is about 1/10 of a milligram. Vitamin D is a controversial topic, probably because it can help so many! 

Heliotherapy, or sunbathing, was used in the early 1900s, before vaccines and antibiotics, to help with TB, asthma, osteoporosis, tooth decay, psoriasis, mood issues, diabetes, heart disease, and even cancer. 

The government commissioned the University of Illinois Chicago to conduct a study on the toxicity of vitamin D. This study lasted nine years and involved hundreds of doctors, 773 patients, and 63 dogs. They used 200,000-1,000,000 IU of vitamin D, and no toxicity was found. 

Dr. Bruce Hollis, a pioneer in vitamin D research, explains that many vitamin D researchers are not receptive to the wealth of data about its benefits.

Data shows that areas close to the equator have the lowest risk of MS, breast cancer, colorectal cancer, and diabetes.  

You will need more vitamin D if you have vitamin D resistance, are older, have darker skin, or weigh more.

videos.title: UK | 17th April, Friday - RIFT Training
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 17th April, Friday - RIFT Training 17/04/26
3FO – The Next-Generation Financial Ecosystem Powered by AI and DeFi

3FO is an innovative digital platform designed to redefine how individuals interact with modern finance. Built at the intersection of artificial intelligence, decentralized finance (DeFi), and blockchain transparency, 3FO provides users with powerful tools to participate in the evolving digital economy and explore new opportunities for wealth creation.

At the core of the 3FO ecosystem is its vision of financial empowerment through accessible technology. The platform combines advanced AI-driven strategies with decentralized infrastructure, enabling users to participate in automated yield systems without needing deep technical knowledge of trading or DeFi protocols.

One of the standout elements of 3FO is the Alpha AI Yield engine, an intelligent system designed to optimize digital asset strategies and manage yield generation across multiple decentralized protocols. By leveraging adaptive algorithms and diversified deployment strategies, Alpha AI continuously analyzes market conditions and allocates capital in ways intended to maximize efficiency and performance.

3FO also introduces an integrated financial framework that brings together several powerful components within one ecosystem. These include LQUIDPAY, a self-custodial DeFi banking environment that enables global transactions, crypto spending, and on-chain yield opportunities, and Protocol Yield, a performance-focused platform designed to provide transparent, traceable returns powered by decentralized financial strategies.

Another key feature of the platform is its emphasis on transparency and user control. Because the system operates on blockchain infrastructure, users can view earnings and transactions in real time, providing visibility into how digital assets move and generate yield across the network.

3FO is also built with scalability and collaboration in mind. Through its network-driven model, participants can expand their engagement within the ecosystem while benefiting from a structure designed to encourage shared growth and collective success.

With a focus on AI automation, decentralized finance innovation, and user-controlled digital banking, 3FO aims to create a comprehensive financial environment where technology works continuously to support smarter asset management and new economic opportunities.

As the global financial landscape evolves toward blockchain-based systems, 3FO positions itself as a forward-thinking platform that merges cutting-edge technology with accessible financial tools—empowering individuals to participate in the future of programmable money and decentralized wealth creation. 17/04/26

videos.title: New M5 v RS6 GT v AMG GT v Panamera Turbo S: DRAG RACE
videos.summary_source_text:
New M5 v RS6 GT v AMG GT v Panamera Turbo S: DRAG RACE Explore new & used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-1604-

It’s the ultimate German V8 showdown as we bring together four German heavyweights at the Carwow drag race strip!

We’ve got our hands on the limited-edition Audi RS6 GT, the Mercedes-AMG GT 63 S, the brand-new BMW M5 Touring, and the incredible Porsche Panamera Turbo S E-Hybrid.

Let’s take a closer look at the stats…

The Audi RS6 GT is the most hardcore version of the RS6 we’ve ever seen, featuring a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 that pumps out 630hp and 850Nm of torque. It utilises an 8-speed automatic gearbox to send power to all four wheels and weighs in at 2,075kg.

The Mercedes-AMG GT 63 S is the lightest car in this lineup at 2,045kg and relies on pure internal combustion rather than hybrid assistance like in the BMW & Porsche. Its 4-litre twin-turbo V8 produces 639hp and 900Nm of torque, paired with a snappy 9-speed automatic transmission that is famous for its brutal launches.

The all-new BMW M5 Touring arrives with a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8 coupled with an electric motor that combines to deliver a massive 727hp and 1,000Nm of torque. While it is the heavy hitter of the group at 2,475kg, that 8-speed automatic gearbox and instant electric torque might just be enough to offset that huge weight.

The Porsche Panamera Turbo S E-Hybrid rounds out the grid as the most powerful car here, boasting a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 hybrid setup that generates a staggering 782hp and 1,000Nm of torque. It uses a lightning-fast 8-speed automatic transmission to manage all that power, and despite its high-end luxury, it is ready to give the others a real run for their money.

So will the more powerful hybrids win it? Or will the extra weight slow them down? There’s only one way to find out for sure… LET’S RACE!

New Audi S5 vs its rivals: https://bit.ly/Carwow-Drag-Race-1604

videos.title: Tomtar och unionsupplösning
videos.summary_source_text:
Tomtar och unionsupplösning 00:00 Start
00:40 Tomtar och unionsupplösning
01:26 Den svensk-norska unionen
02:30 Oscar I och unionsmärket
03:29 Björnstierne Björnsson i Göteborg
05:04 Viktor Rydberg och Peter Christen Asbjörnsen
05:38 Tomtar
06:37 Redaktör Sven Adolf Hedlund
09:45 Bjurslätt och inskriptionerna
12:09 Polarfararna

Sverige och Norge var förenade i en union 1814-1905 och det gemensamma märket på ländernas flaggor var från början en symbol för en jämställd union, men kom senare att tolkas som över- och underordning. Vad hade hänt om unionen hade styrts från Göteborg i stället för från Stockholm? Oslo ligger ju närmare Göteborg än vad Stockholm gör. Under 1800-talet besöktes det liberala Göteborg av en lång rad norska kulturpersonligheter: Björnstierne Björnsson, Peter Christen Asbjörnsen, Henrik Ibsen och Fridtjof Nansen. De har alla gjort permanent avtryck i staden, närmare bestämt på Hisingen, och alla hade stor betydelse för utformningen av en norsk identitet i samband med självständigheten.

Viktor Rydberg och Jenny Nyström skapade tillsammans bilden av den svenska tomten, en grå gestalt med rötter i folktron. Men kommer kanske inspirationen från Norge? Filmen gör nedslag i både tomtar och unionsupplösningen - kanske första gången som dessa teman förekommer i ett gemensamt sammanhang.

05:38 Tomtar
06:37 Redaktör Sven Adolf Hedlund
09:45 Bjurslätt och inskriptionerna
12:09 Polarfararna

Sverige och Norge var förenade i en union 1814-1905 och det gemensamma märket på ländernas flaggor var från början en symbol för en jämställd union, men kom senare att tolkas som över- och underordning. Vad hade hänt om unionen hade styrts från Göteborg i stället för från Stockholm? Oslo ligger ju närmare Göteborg än vad Stockholm gör. Under 1800-talet besöktes det liberala Göteborg av en lång rad norska kulturpersonligheter: Björnstierne Björnsson, Peter Christen Asbjörnsen, Henrik Ibsen och Fridtjof Nansen. De har alla gjort permanent avtryck i staden, närmare bestämt på Hisingen, och alla hade stor betydelse för utformningen av en norsk identitet i samband med självständigheten.

Viktor Rydberg och Jenny Nyström skapade tillsammans bilden av den svenska tomten, en grå gestalt med rötter i folktron. Men kommer kanske inspirationen från Norge? Filmen gör nedslag i både tomtar och unionsupplösningen - kanske första gången som dessa teman förekommer i ett gemensamt sammanhang.

Medicinhistoriska museet
https://www.vgregion.se/medicinhistoriska

Tomtehuset
https://sv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tomtehuset

Gamla Stadsbiblioteket
https://sv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Samh%C3%A4llsvetenskapliga_biblioteket

Hisingsparken
https://goteborg.se/wps/portal/start/uppleva-och-gora/parker-och-lekplatser/naturomraden/hitta-naturomraden?id=3738

videos.title: Hindi | 17th April, Friday - RIFT Auto-Trading Launch
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi | 17th April, Friday - RIFT Auto-Trading Launch 17/04/26
3FO – The Next-Generation Financial Ecosystem Powered by AI and DeFi

3FO is an innovative digital platform designed to redefine how individuals interact with modern finance. Built at the intersection of artificial intelligence, decentralized finance (DeFi), and blockchain transparency, 3FO provides users with powerful tools to participate in the evolving digital economy and explore new opportunities for wealth creation.

At the core of the 3FO ecosystem is its vision of financial empowerment through accessible technology. The platform combines advanced AI-driven strategies with decentralized infrastructure, enabling users to participate in automated yield systems without needing deep technical knowledge of trading or DeFi protocols.

One of the standout elements of 3FO is the Alpha AI Yield engine, an intelligent system designed to optimize digital asset strategies and manage yield generation across multiple decentralized protocols. By leveraging adaptive algorithms and diversified deployment strategies, Alpha AI continuously analyzes market conditions and allocates capital in ways intended to maximize efficiency and performance.

3FO also introduces an integrated financial framework that brings together several powerful components within one ecosystem. These include LQUIDPAY, a self-custodial DeFi banking environment that enables global transactions, crypto spending, and on-chain yield opportunities, and Protocol Yield, a performance-focused platform designed to provide transparent, traceable returns powered by decentralized financial strategies.

Another key feature of the platform is its emphasis on transparency and user control. Because the system operates on blockchain infrastructure, users can view earnings and transactions in real time, providing visibility into how digital assets move and generate yield across the network.

3FO is also built with scalability and collaboration in mind. Through its network-driven model, participants can expand their engagement within the ecosystem while benefiting from a structure designed to encourage shared growth and collective success.

With a focus on AI automation, decentralized finance innovation, and user-controlled digital banking, 3FO aims to create a comprehensive financial environment where technology works continuously to support smarter asset management and new economic opportunities.

As the global financial landscape evolves toward blockchain-based systems, 3FO positions itself as a forward-thinking platform that merges cutting-edge technology with accessible financial tools—empowering individuals to participate in the future of programmable money and decentralized wealth creation. 17/04/26

Before He Was Mr. Olympia, No One Cared Before Dorian Yates became a 6x Mr. Olympia bodybuilding champion, he was living in a council estate with no car, no money, and no support. This is the story of how obsession, discipline, and a relentless sense of purpose turned him into one of the most dominant bodybuilders in history.

Subscribe to RESPIRE for more science-based health tips: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCyNaCRf6Aaljcm9ZWARawXw

This video is a condensed and highly edited version of the full 2 hour and 46 minute podcast from @HubermanLab. For more information, watch the full episode and following the podcast.

Dorian Yates (born April 19, 1962) is a legendary English IFBB professional bodybuilder who dominated the sport in the 1990s, winning six consecutive Mr. Olympia titles (1992–1997). Known as "The Shadow" for his low-profile approach, he pioneered high-intensity training (HIT) methods, featuring massive, dense muscle mass that revolutionized professional bodybuilding.

Andrew D. Huberman is an American neuroscientist and tenured associate professor in the department of neurobiology and psychiatry and behavioral sciences at Stanford University School of Medicine.

videos.title: Anthropic Just Dropped Claude 4.7 And Exposed A Secret Super Model
videos.summary_source_text:
Anthropic Just Dropped Claude 4.7 And Exposed A Secret Super Model 👉 Try Higgsfield Marketing Studio here: https://higgsfield.ai/s/marketing-studio-airevolutionx-DrJBHU
Anthropic just launched Claude Opus 4.7, and this feels bigger than a normal model update. It pushes much harder in coding, long agent-style workflows, vision, and instruction following, though the real shock is that Anthropic is openly saying an even stronger model already exists behind the scenes. That model is Claude Mythos Preview, and the company says it is still too risky for broad release because of its cybersecurity capabilities.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com
🚀 New Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@science.revolution

🧠 What You’ll See
0:00 Intro
1:05 Claude Opus 4.7 launch, rollout, pricing, and performance upgrades
SOURCE: https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-opus-4-7
2:18 Claude 4.7 benchmarks, coding gains, and why Anthropic is pushing it as the new serious-work model
SOURCE: https://venturebeat.com/technology/anthropic-releases-claude-opus-4-7-narrowly-retaking-lead-for-most-powerful-generally-available-llm
3:06 Beating GPT-5.4 and Gemini 3.1 Pro
6:12 New xhigh effort level
7:29 Vision upgrade - 3x more image detail
8:17 Better instruction following and memory
11:30 Why Claude Mythos Preview is stronger and still locked down
SOURCE: https://red.anthropic.com/2026/mythos-preview/
13:21 Project Glasswing, cyber safeguards, and the security risk Anthropic is trying to contain
SOURCE: https://www.anthropic.com/glasswing

🚨 Why It Matters
This goes way beyond one model launch. Claude 4.7 strengthens Anthropic in the coding and agent race right now, while Mythos signals that a more dangerous class of cyber-capable models is already here. That turns this from a product story into a much bigger race around power, safety, and who is actually ready for what comes next.

Over 500,000+ lines of Anthropic’s source code were accidentally exposed — revealing Claude 4.7, Sonnet 4.8, and an entirely new model tier called Mythos.

But here’s the real story:
This isn’t just another model upgrade.

This is the moment AI shifts from chatbots → autonomous coworkers.

• Claude 4.7 and 4.8 — what’s actually changing

• And what this means for developers, businesses, and the AI race

By the end, you’ll understand why this leak might be more important than any official AI launch this year.

videos.title: FHN Final Take: Jessica Blaylock, George Richards Break Down the 2025-26 Florida Panthers
videos.summary_source_text:
FHN Final Take: Jessica Blaylock, George Richards Break Down the 2025-26 Florida Panthers Florida Panthers television reporter Jessica Blaylock and FHN Publisher George Richards break down the 2025-26 season from the IcePlex in Fort Lauderdale on April 16, 2026. 

The Panthers won three straight to end the season but will end the season out of the Stanley Cup Playoffs. 

Late Thursday night, they did clinch the No. 8 spot in the pre-lottery draft standings and will have a 2026 first-round pick if they want it. 

Florida won the past two Stanley Cup championships. 

The two-time Stanley Cup champions will miss the playoffs for the first time since 2019. 

The Panthers Have Done It Again, Repeat as Cup Champs: https://floridahockeynow.com/florida-panthers-repeat-stanley-cup-champions-2025/

videos.title: Varför Lysa framför Opti?
videos.summary_source_text:
Varför Lysa framför Opti? ⚠️ Viktig info:

Detta innehåll är inte individuell investeringsrådgivning. Ett sparande i linje med forskningens rekommendationer har historiskt sett varit framgångsrikt. Det finns mycket som talar för att så även kommer vara framgent, men det finns inga garantier. Historisk avkastning är ingen garanti för framtida avkastning. Alla investeringar innebär risk och kan både öka och minska i värde. Investera inte pengar du inte har råd att förlora. Mer info på rikatillsammans.se.

FOLLOW ME ⬇️

X: https://twitter.com/RickShielsPGA
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rickshielspga/
Website: http://www.rickshiels.com/

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Huge thanks to Golfbidder & Golf Avenue. Check them out: 

Visit Golfbidder: https://tinyurl.com/GolfbidderShop

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control

videos.title: McDavid’s Momentum Mystery Uncovered
videos.summary_source_text:
McDavid’s Momentum Mystery Uncovered The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body’s own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness.
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

6x Mr. Olympia: You Only Need 2 Workouts Per Week Discover how high-intensity training (HIT) and minimalist workouts can build muscle and strength with just 45 minutes twice a week—plus why 6 minutes of HIIT cardio can rival 30–45 minutes of steady-state cardio for real-world results. This science vs real-world training breakdown reveals how to avoid overtraining, boost metabolism, and get stronger with less time.

This video is a condensed and highly edited version of the full 2 hour and 46 minute podcast from @HubermanLab. For more information, watch the full episode and following the podcast.

Dorian Yates (born April 19, 1962) is a legendary English IFBB professional bodybuilder who dominated the sport in the 1990s, winning six consecutive Mr. Olympia titles (1992–1997). Known as "The Shadow" for his low-profile approach, he pioneered high-intensity training (HIT) methods, featuring massive, dense muscle mass that revolutionized professional bodybuilding.

Andrew D. Huberman is an American neuroscientist and tenured associate professor in the department of neurobiology and psychiatry and behavioral sciences at Stanford University School of Medicine.

Dorian Yates (born April 19, 1962) is a legendary English IFBB professional bodybuilder who dominated the sport in the 1990s, winning six consecutive Mr. Olympia titles (1992–1997). Known as "The Shadow" for his low-profile approach, he pioneered high-intensity training (HIT) methods, featuring massive, dense muscle mass that revolutionized professional bodybuilding.

Andrew D. Huberman is an American neuroscientist and tenured associate professor in the department of neurobiology and psychiatry and behavioral sciences at Stanford University School of Medicine.

What Happens If You Take B12 Daily for 14 Days? What would happen if you took vitamin B12 every single day for 14 days?

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

👉 Get Dr. Berg’s Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/4mCEeS3

In this video, we break down the powerful effects of B12 on your brain, nerves, energy, and overall health, and why this essential vitamin plays a critical role in how you feel every day.

Vitamin B12 is essential for your brain and nerve health, and low levels can lead to fatigue, cognitive issues, and even nerve-related symptoms.

It also plays a key role in preventing certain types of anemia by helping your body transport oxygen to your brain and muscles.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

• Full 18-hole course vlogs

• Amazing golf courses

• Worldwide golf adventures

videos.title: PLAYOFF CROSSOVER PREVIEW! Carolina Hurricanes Round 1 Matchup Against the Ottawa Senators
videos.summary_source_text:
PLAYOFF CROSSOVER PREVIEW! Carolina Hurricanes Round 1 Matchup Against the Ottawa Senators The Carolina Hurricanes will take on the Ottawa Senators for the first time in the playoffs. What are the storylines heading into the series? What are some key stats to focus on? Who are going to be the X-Factors? Who will win the series and in how many games? On the Friday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach joins Ross and Brandon from Locked On Senators as the guys preview the upcoming Round 1 match-up of the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs between the Hurricanes and Senators. After a wild season for both teams, how do they look going into the postseason? What are the biggest storylines from both sides? Secondly, the guys discuss key stats to focus on from both teams. They talk about expected goals, franchise records, players who stepped up during the season, and more. Finally, the guys conclude the show by discussing potential X-Factors for the Hurricanes and Senators. Who has the potential to take over the series? The guys also make their Round 1 predictions. Who will win the series, and in how many games? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: UK | 16th April, Thursday - RIFT Auto-Trading Launch
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 16th April, Thursday - RIFT Auto-Trading Launch 16/04/26
3FO – The Next-Generation Financial Ecosystem Powered by AI and DeFi

3FO is an innovative digital platform designed to redefine how individuals interact with modern finance. Built at the intersection of artificial intelligence, decentralized finance (DeFi), and blockchain transparency, 3FO provides users with powerful tools to participate in the evolving digital economy and explore new opportunities for wealth creation.

At the core of the 3FO ecosystem is its vision of financial empowerment through accessible technology. The platform combines advanced AI-driven strategies with decentralized infrastructure, enabling users to participate in automated yield systems without needing deep technical knowledge of trading or DeFi protocols.

One of the standout elements of 3FO is the Alpha AI Yield engine, an intelligent system designed to optimize digital asset strategies and manage yield generation across multiple decentralized protocols. By leveraging adaptive algorithms and diversified deployment strategies, Alpha AI continuously analyzes market conditions and allocates capital in ways intended to maximize efficiency and performance.

3FO also introduces an integrated financial framework that brings together several powerful components within one ecosystem. These include LQUIDPAY, a self-custodial DeFi banking environment that enables global transactions, crypto spending, and on-chain yield opportunities, and Protocol Yield, a performance-focused platform designed to provide transparent, traceable returns powered by decentralized financial strategies.

Another key feature of the platform is its emphasis on transparency and user control. Because the system operates on blockchain infrastructure, users can view earnings and transactions in real time, providing visibility into how digital assets move and generate yield across the network.

3FO is also built with scalability and collaboration in mind. Through its network-driven model, participants can expand their engagement within the ecosystem while benefiting from a structure designed to encourage shared growth and collective success.

With a focus on AI automation, decentralized finance innovation, and user-controlled digital banking, 3FO aims to create a comprehensive financial environment where technology works continuously to support smarter asset management and new economic opportunities.

As the global financial landscape evolves toward blockchain-based systems, 3FO positions itself as a forward-thinking platform that merges cutting-edge technology with accessible financial tools—empowering individuals to participate in the future of programmable money and decentralized wealth creation. 16/04/26

I build a small Sims-style game, make an interactive website, and test a history of AI timeline. I also ask Claude Opus 4.7 to create a cinematic data visualization, a realistic 3D Earth, and a powers of 10 style experience. A lot of these tests use visual outputs, artifacts, and code in the background, so you can see how Claude handles creative work step by step.

I also test prompt following, adaptive thinking, reasoning, and how well Claude Opus 4.7 handles detailed instructions. I look at where it does really well, where it needs a follow-up prompt, and how it compares to older Claude models and other AI models.

videos.title: Elon Musk vs Sam Altman Gets UGLY… OpenAI Built AGI and Hid It? | The Late Byte with Robi
videos.summary_source_text:
Elon Musk vs Sam Altman Gets UGLY… OpenAI Built AGI and Hid It? | The Late Byte with Robi Robi's back behind the desk — and the internet had a week.
In tonight's episode: leaked court documents from the Musk vs OpenAI trial suggest GPT-4o may have been classified internally as AGI… and then quietly retired. What happened, who benefited, and why is everyone acting like nothing happened?

Plus: A Cursor AI agent left unsupervised for four days cracks a math problem that stumped human researchers. And Jack Dorsey blames AI for laying off 40% of Block's workforce — but did AI really take those jobs, or just take the blame?

This is The Late Byte with Robi — your weekly dose of AI news, served with sarcasm and zero bathroom breaks.

videos.title: Gemini 3.2 Explained: 77% Benchmark Leap, $0.25/M Tokens & What Google Is Hiding
videos.summary_source_text:
Gemini 3.2 Explained: 77% Benchmark Leap, $0.25/M Tokens & What Google Is Hiding 🔗 Try TicNote Cloud: https://ticnote.com/?via=bitbiasedai

Everyone's talking about Gemini 3.2 — but does it actually exist? I went through every official Google document, API changelog, and developer page to find out. What I discovered is far more interesting than a version number.

In this video, I break down everything we actually know about Google's Gemini 3 family: the 77.1% ARC-AGI-2 score (up from under 5%), Flash-Lite at $0.25 per million tokens, the real-time voice play with Flash Live, and how it all stacks up against GPT-4o, Llama 3, and Claude 3. Plus the privacy and security details that could save your next AI project.

videos.title: Florida Panthers GM Bill Zito at the End of the 2025-26 Season, Champs Miss Playoffs
videos.summary_source_text:
Florida Panthers GM Bill Zito at the End of the 2025-26 Season, Champs Miss Playoffs Florida Panthers general manager Bill Zito meets the media after his team wrapped up its season at the IcePlex in Fort Lauderdale on April 16, 2026. 

The Panthers won three straight to end the season but will end the season out of the Stanley Cup Playoffs. 

Florida won the past two Stanley Cup championships. 

The two-time Stanley Cup champions will miss the playoffs for the first time since 2019. 

Video Courtesy Florida Panthers / @FlaPanthers / Panthers Vision

videos.title: Florida Panthers Captain Sasha Barkov Talks Missing 2025-26 Season, Playing for Finland at Worlds
videos.summary_source_text:
Florida Panthers Captain Sasha Barkov Talks Missing 2025-26 Season, Playing for Finland at Worlds Florida Panthers captain Aleksander Sasha Barkov meets the media after his team wrapped up its season at the IcePlex in Fort Lauderdale on April 16, 2026. 

Barkov missed the entire season after injuring his right knee on his first day of training camp. 

He confirmed Thursday that he would play for Finland at the upcoming World Championships.

The Panthers won three straight to end the season but will end the season out of the Stanley Cup Playoffs. 

Florida won the past two Stanley Cup championships. 

The two-time Stanley Cup champions will miss the playoffs for the first time since 2019. 

Video Courtesy Florida Panthers / @FlaPanthers / Panthers Vision

In this video, I tested InclawAI — a fully managed hosting platform that lets you run OpenClaw without servers, coding, or DevOps. From setup to real-world automation, I break down how it works, what you get, and whether it’s actually worth it.

We’re talking:
• AI agents running 24/7 in the background
• WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack automation
• Multi-step workflows and real task execution
• Built-in token credits (no API setup needed)
• Real pricing vs self-hosting

OpenClaw itself is powerful because it can automate tasks across apps and run continuously like a personal assistant — but the setup is where most people quit. This is exactly the problem InclawAI is trying to solve.

videos.title: Labeda Evo Spacer System Review
videos.summary_source_text:
Labeda Evo Spacer System Review IW Hockey reviews the Labeda Evo Spacer System. 

Compared to traditional spacer systems that have a large gap between the bearings, the Evo Spacers are able to concentrate power through the center of the wheel. This allows players to flex the entire wheel and not just the top part of the urethane, creating significantly more speed-promoting rebound and much better gripping power. Another important improvement of having the bearings right next to each is to prevent bearing bind and the massive glide and power decrease that occurs in traditional wheels.

videos.title: REGULAR SEASON AWARD TIME! Carolina Hurricanes' 2025-26 Team Award Winners
videos.summary_source_text:
REGULAR SEASON AWARD TIME! Carolina Hurricanes' 2025-26 Team Award Winners The Carolina Hurricanes finished the regular season with a 53-22-7 record and 113 points. They claimed the first seed in the Eastern Conference and won their fourth division title in the last six seasons. All of that being said,  who helped lead the way throughout the season? On the Thursday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on who won the team MVP for the Hurricanes in 2025-26. Does he align with the Carolina Chapter of the Professional Hockey Writers Association (PHWA), which picked goaltender Brandon Bussi? videos.title: This Water Habit Could Send You to the Hospital
videos.summary_source_text:
This Water Habit Could Send You to the Hospital How much water should you drink each day? Discover the truth behind the 8 glasses a day myth, the side effects of drinking too much water, and proper hydration tips to keep you hydrated and support overall health. 

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

0:00 Introduction: The drink water myth 
1:28 Hydration facts
3:43 Water intake truth
4:10 Thirst and your daily water needs
6:57 Does everyone need 8 glasses of water?
7:06 Urine color and hydration explained 
8:04 Overhydration risks

Download Dr. Berg’s Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/4ccJatb

Keep watching for more hydration tips:
▶️ https://youtu.be/f7bQGGW3UTg
▶️ https://youtu.be/nJEAqOdnF2E
▶️ https://youtu.be/0p7JvFrEqiQ

Thirst tells the body when to drink. There isn’t a single clinical trial that has established exactly how much water we need each day to stay healthy, so where did the “8 glasses of water per day” recommendation come from?

A recommendation published in 1945 suggested consuming approximately 2.5 liters of water per day, but it also noted that most of this intake would come from food. The average person gets close to 1 liter of water from food daily, and the body also produces metabolic water.

Over time, “8 glasses a day” turned into drinking even when you’re not thirsty, but thirst tells the body when to drink fluid. A person’s daily water needs depend on age, body size, physical activity, climate, and other factors, so the number will vary from person to person. 

Urine color can help indicate your hydration level. Dark urine means you need more water, while clear urine may indicate overhydration, which can negatively affect electrolyte balance.

Hyponatremia, low sodium in the blood, is a potential risk of overhydration.

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

videos.title: I specced a Bugatti Tourbillon!
videos.summary_source_text:
I specced a Bugatti Tourbillon! Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-16-04

What happens when you have a blank check and the keys to two of the most exclusive hypercars in the world? Today, Mat is living every petrolhead’s wildest dream…

He’s flown over to Bugatti chateau, and then back to the UK, and he’s speccing two of the most desirable cars in the world - the Bugatti Tourbillon, and the GMA T.50! 

First up, Mat pays a visit to Bugatti. Guided by one of Bugatti’s lead designers, he has to navigate a world of limitless carbon fibre, ‘standard’ paint jobs that cost more than a house, and a whole load of bespoke specifications which include adding 8(!) exhaust tips to the rear of the car! The question is, will he go for something sleek and minimalist, or will he choose to go for something that screams opulence? 

As a reminder, the Tourbillon is powered by an 8.3-litre naturally aspirated V16 + 3 electric motors, and these combine to produce 1,800hp. It redlines at 9,000rpm, and it has a top speed of 276mph!

Then, things get personal. Mat heads to Gordon Murray Automotive to spec the T.50, and he’s not just talking to a salesperson - he’s sitting down with the legend himself, Gordon Murray! This is the spiritual successor to the McLaren F1, where every gram of weight is scrutinised. From the fan-assisted aero to the centre-seat driving position, Gordon guides Mat through the art of perfection through lightness, while also offering his own recommendations to Mat’s choices. He’ll also reveal his own bespoke T.50 specification at the end of the video! 

The T.50 is powered by a 3.9-litre Cosworth V12, and it weighs in at only 997kg! It redlines at an incredible 12,100rpm, and it’ll come as no surprise that it’s only available with a 6-speed manual gearbox!

So one is a V16 hybrid monster, while the other is a lightweight V12 masterpiece focused on the pure connection between driver and road. The question is, which will Mat prefer? You’ll need to keep watching to see for yourself! Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-16-04
